results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  SUM(t.total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
  SUM(t.rented_rooms) AS rented_rooms,
  SUM(t.vacant_rooms) AS vacant_rooms,
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(t.total_rooms) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE SUM(t.rented_rooms) / SUM(t.total_rooms) * 100
    END,
    2
  ) AS overall_rental_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    IFNULL(SUM(room_count), 0) AS total_rooms,
    IFNULL(SUM(room_count - IFNULL(rest_room_count, 0)), 0) AS rented_rooms,
    IFNULL(SUM(rest_room_count), 0) AS vacant_rooms
  FROM qft_focus_housing
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(is_check_out, 0) = 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    IFNULL(SUM(room_count), 0) AS total_rooms,
    IFNULL(SUM(room_count - IFNULL(rest_room_count, 0)), 0) AS rented_rooms,
    IFNULL(SUM(rest_room_count), 0) AS vacant_rooms
  FROM qft_joint_housing
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(is_check_out, 0) = 0
) t;

results.question: 翡翠城那边有多少套房子？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(1) AS housing_count
FROM (
    SELECT fh.id
    FROM qft_focus_housing fh
    JOIN qft_area_property ap ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id
    WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
      AND ap.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
      AND ap.property_adrr LIKE '%翡翠城%'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT jh.id
    FROM qft_joint_housing jh
    JOIN qft_area_property ap ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
    WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
      AND ap.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(jh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
      AND ap.property_adrr LIKE '%翡翠城%'
) t;

results.question: 张三租的哪间房？月租多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.id AS tenant_id,
  t.name AS tenant_name,
  CONCAT_WS('', p.property_adrr, h.building, h.unit_name, r.room_number) AS rented_room,
  r.room_number AS room_number,
  ti.lease_price AS monthly_rent,
  ti.payment_method
FROM qft_focus_tenants t
INNER JOIN qft_focus_room r
  ON t.room_id = r.id
INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing h
  ON r.housing_id = h.id
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property p
  ON h.property_adrr = p.id
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info ti
  ON ti.tenant_id = t.id
WHERE t.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND r.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND h.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND p.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(p.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND ti.company_id = 1001
  AND t.name = '张三'
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC, ti.create_time DESC;

results.question: 刘洋手上管了几套房源？
results.generated_sql:
WITH target_user AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.user_id
    FROM qft_butler b
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_trust ft
        ON ft.salesman_id = b.id
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON ft.housing_id = fh.id
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND fh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND ft.salesman_name = '刘洋'

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT b.user_id
    FROM qft_butler b
    INNER JOIN qft_common_housing_renewal chr
        ON chr.salesman_id = b.id
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND chr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND chr.salesman_name = '刘洋'

    UNION

    SELECT DISTINCT b.user_id
    FROM qft_butler b
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info fti
        ON fti.salesman_id = b.id
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND fti.company_id = 1001
      AND fti.salesman_name = '刘洋'
)
SELECT
    (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id)
        FROM qft_focus_trust ft
        INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
            ON ft.housing_id = fh.id
        INNER JOIN qft_butler b
            ON ft.salesman_id = b.id
        INNER JOIN target_user tu
            ON b.user_id = tu.user_id
        WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND b.company_id = 1001
    ) +
    (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT jh.id)
        FROM qft_joint_housing jh
        INNER JOIN qft_butler b
            ON jh.salesman_id = b.id
        INNER JOIN target_user tu
            ON b.user_id = tu.user_id
        WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND b.company_id = 1001
    ) AS housing_count;

results.question: 翡翠城2栋2-1-101租出去了没？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.business_mode AS '业务类型',
  t.property_name AS '小区',
  t.full_address AS '房间地址',
  t.rent_status AS '出租状态',
  t.last_rent_time AS '最后出租时间'
FROM (
  SELECT
    '集中房源' AS business_mode,
    ap.property_adrr AS property_name,
    CONCAT(
      IFNULL(fh.building, ''),
      IFNULL(fh.unit_name, ''),
      CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(fh.unit_name, '') <> ''
         AND IFNULL(fr.room_number, '') <> ''
         AND RIGHT(IFNULL(fh.unit_name, ''), 1) <> '-'
        THEN '-'
        ELSE ''
      END,
      IFNULL(fr.room_number, '')
    ) AS full_address,
    CASE fr.is_lease
      WHEN 1 THEN '已出租'
      WHEN 2 THEN '待转租'
      ELSE '未出租'
    END AS rent_status,
    fr.last_time AS last_rent_time
  FROM qft_focus_room fr
  JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
    ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
  JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id
  WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND fh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND ap.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND ap.property_adrr = '翡翠城'
    AND REPLACE(REPLACE(CONCAT(IFNULL(fh.building, ''), IFNULL(fh.unit_name, ''), IFNULL(fr.room_number, '')), '-', ''), ' ', '') =
        REPLACE(REPLACE('2栋2-1-101', '-', ''), ' ', '')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '合租/整租房源' AS business_mode,
    ap.property_adrr AS property_name,
    CONCAT(
      IFNULL(jh.building, ''),
      IFNULL(jh.unit_name, ''),
      CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(jh.unit_name, '') <> ''
         AND IFNULL(jh.door_number, '') <> ''
         AND RIGHT(IFNULL(jh.unit_name, ''), 1) <> '-'
        THEN '-'
        ELSE ''
      END,
      IFNULL(jh.door_number, '')
    ) AS full_address,
    CASE
      WHEN IFNULL(jh.is_check_out, 0) = 1 THEN '已退房'
      WHEN IFNULL(jh.rest_room_count, 0) = 0 THEN '已出租'
      WHEN IFNULL(jh.rest_room_count, 0) < IFNULL(jh.room_count, 0) THEN '部分已出租'
      ELSE '未出租'
    END AS rent_status,
    NULL AS last_rent_time
  FROM qft_joint_housing jh
  JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
  WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND ap.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND ap.property_adrr = '翡翠城'
    AND REPLACE(REPLACE(CONCAT(IFNULL(jh.building, ''), IFNULL(jh.unit_name, ''), IFNULL(jh.door_number, '')), '-', ''), ' ', '') =
        REPLACE(REPLACE('2栋2-1-101', '-', ''), ' ', '')
) t
LIMIT 10;

FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) AS cnt
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft
      ON ft.room_id = fr.id
     AND ft.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
     AND ft.delivery_order_status = 1
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fr.is_lease = 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT jr.id) AS cnt
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
      ON jt.room_id = jr.id
     AND jt.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
     AND jt.delivery_order_status = 1
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND jr.is_lease = 1
) t;

results.question: 下个月有哪些合租租客合同到期？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    c.name AS city_name,
    s.name AS store_name,
    h.house_code,
    CONCAT(IFNULL(h.building, ''), IFNULL(h.unit_name, ''), IFNULL(h.door_number, '')) AS house_address,
    r.room_number,
    t.tenants_name,
    t.phone,
    t.lease_starttime,
    t.lease_endtime,
    t.electronic_contract_status,
    t.delivery_order_status
FROM qft_joint_tenants t
INNER JOIN qft_joint_room r
    ON t.room_id = r.id
    AND r.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing h
    ON r.housing_id = h.id
    AND h.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_store s
    ON r.store_id = s.id
    AND s.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_prov_city_area c
    ON r.city_id = c.id
WHERE t.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
  AND t.lease_endtime >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND t.lease_endtime < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
ORDER BY t.lease_endtime ASC, s.name ASC, h.house_code ASC, r.room_number ASC, t.tenants_name ASC;

WITH bill_summary AS (
    SELECT
        i.tenants_id,
        SUM(IFNULL(i.final_money, 0)) AS total_due_bill_amount,
        SUM(IFNULL(i.real_money, 0)) AS total_paid_amount,
        SUM(IFNULL(i.debt_money, 0)) AS total_debt_amount,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN IFNULL(i.debt_money, 0) > 0 THEN 1 END) AS unpaid_bill_count,
        MIN(CASE WHEN IFNULL(i.debt_money, 0) > 0 THEN i.collection_date END) AS first_unpaid_due_date
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income i
    WHERE i.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(i.is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(i.is_deposit, 0) = 0
      AND i.collection_date <= NOW()
    GROUP BY i.tenants_id
),
latest_due_bill AS (
    SELECT
        i.tenants_id,
        i.collection_date,
        i.start_valid_date,
        i.end_valid_date,
        i.final_money,
        i.real_money,
        i.debt_money,
        i.pay_status,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY i.tenants_id
            ORDER BY i.collection_date DESC, i.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income i
    WHERE i.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(i.is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(i.is_deposit, 0) = 0
      AND i.collection_date <= NOW()
)

    lb.collection_date AS latest_due_date,

        WHEN lb.tenants_id IS NULL THEN '暂无到期账单'
        WHEN IFNULL(bs.total_debt_amount, 0) > 0 THEN '未交清'

    IFNULL(lb.real_money, 0) AS latest_paid_amount,
    IFNULL(lb.debt_money, 0) AS latest_debt_amount,
    IFNULL(bs.total_debt_amount, 0) AS total_debt_amount,
    IFNULL(bs.unpaid_bill_count, 0) AS unpaid_bill_count,
    bs.first_unpaid_due_date
FROM qft_focus_tenants t
JOIN qft_focus_room r
  ON t.room_id = r.id
 AND r.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_focus_housing h
  ON r.housing_id = h.id
 AND h.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
  ON h.property_adrr = ap.id
 AND ap.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN bill_summary bs
  ON bs.tenants_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN latest_due_bill lb
  ON lb.tenants_id = t.id
 AND lb.rn = 1
WHERE t.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND t.name = '张三'
ORDER BY IFNULL(bs.total_debt_amount, 0) DESC, t.id DESC;

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE months AS (
    SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE) AS month_start
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE_ADD(month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    FROM months
    WHERE month_start < CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
),
finance_month AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE) AS month_start,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS income_amount,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS expend_amount
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND account_date >= CAST(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
      AND account_date < DATE_ADD(CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    GROUP BY CAST(DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
),
monthly_result AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS stat_month,
        IFNULL(f.income_amount, 0) AS income_amount,
        IFNULL(f.expend_amount, 0) AS expend_amount,
        1 AS sort_order,
        m.month_start AS order_month
    FROM months m
    LEFT JOIN finance_month f
        ON f.month_start = m.month_start
)
SELECT stat_month, income_amount, expend_amount
FROM (
    SELECT stat_month, income_amount, expend_amount, sort_order, order_month
    FROM monthly_result
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        '合计' AS stat_month,
        SUM(income_amount) AS income_amount,
        SUM(expend_amount) AS expend_amount,
        2 AS sort_order,
        NULL AS order_month
    FROM monthly_result
) t
ORDER BY sort_order, order_month;

results.question: 哪个小区的房子好租？哪个不好租？
results.generated_sql:
WITH property_stats AS (
    SELECT
        ap.id AS property_id,
        a.area_name,
        ap.property_adrr AS community_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS housing_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS total_rooms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN r.id END) AS rented_rooms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) <> 1 THEN r.id END) AS vacant_rooms,
        ROUND(AVG(IFNULL(r.cumte_vacancy_day, 0)), 2) AS avg_vacancy_day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN r.id END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT r.id), 0) AS rent_rate
    FROM qft_area_property ap
    INNER JOIN qft_area a
        ON ap.area_id = a.id
       AND a.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(a.is_delete, 0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON h.property_adrr = ap.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_room r
        ON r.housing_id = h.id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY ap.id, a.area_name, ap.property_adrr
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) > 0
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        property_id,
        area_name,
        community_name,
        housing_count,
        total_rooms,
        rented_rooms,
        vacant_rooms,
        avg_vacancy_day,
        ROUND(rent_rate * 100, 2) AS rent_rate_pct,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY rent_rate DESC, avg_vacancy_day ASC, rented_rooms DESC, total_rooms DESC, property_id
        ) AS easy_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY rent_rate ASC, avg_vacancy_day DESC, vacant_rooms DESC, total_rooms DESC, property_id
        ) AS hard_rank
    FROM property_stats
),
final_result AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS sort_type,
        '好租TOP10' AS rank_type,
        easy_rank AS rank_no,
        area_name,
        community_name,
        housing_count,
        total_rooms,
        rented_rooms,
        vacant_rooms,
        avg_vacancy_day,
        rent_rate_pct
    FROM ranked
    WHERE easy_rank <= 10
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        2 AS sort_type,
        '不好租TOP10' AS rank_type,
        hard_rank AS rank_no,
        area_name,
        community_name,
        housing_count,
        total_rooms,
        rented_rooms,
        vacant_rooms,
        avg_vacancy_day,
        rent_rate_pct
    FROM ranked
    WHERE hard_rank <= 10
)
SELECT
    rank_type,
    rank_no,
    area_name,
    community_name,
    housing_count,
    total_rooms,
    rented_rooms,
    vacant_rooms,
    avg_vacancy_day,
    rent_rate_pct
FROM final_result
ORDER BY sort_type, rank_no;

results.question: 整租的收房价和出房价差价多少？哪套赚得最多？
results.generated_sql:
WITH whole_room AS (
    SELECT housing_id, room_id, room_number
    FROM (
        SELECT
            fr.housing_id,
            fr.id AS room_id,
            fr.room_number,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY fr.housing_id
                ORDER BY IFNULL(fr.is_main, 0) DESC, fr.id ASC
            ) AS rn
        FROM qft_focus_room fr
        WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND fr.focus_joint_mode = 2
    ) t
    WHERE t.rn = 1
),
acquisition AS (
    SELECT housing_id, acquisition_price
    FROM (
        SELECT
            fbe.housing_id,
            fbe.housing_money AS acquisition_price,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY fbe.housing_id
                ORDER BY fbe.valid_start_time DESC, fbe.log_index DESC, fbe.id DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM qft_focus_bill_expend fbe
        WHERE fbe.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(fbe.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(fbe.is_history, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(fbe.is_deposit, 0) = 0
    ) t
    WHERE t.rn = 1
),
rental AS (
    SELECT housing_id, room_id, rental_price
    FROM (
        SELECT
            fti.housing_id,
            fti.room_id,
            fti.house_money AS rental_price,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY fti.room_id
                ORDER BY fti.start_valid_date DESC, fti.log_index DESC, fti.id DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fti
        WHERE fti.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(fti.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(fti.is_history, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(fti.is_deposit, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(fti.contract_type, 1) <> 4
    ) t
    WHERE t.rn = 1
),
profit AS (
    SELECT
        fh.id AS housing_id,
        fh.house_code,
        ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
        fh.building,
        fh.unit_name,
        wr.room_number,
        a.acquisition_price,
        r.rental_price,
        r.rental_price - a.acquisition_price AS price_difference
    FROM qft_focus_housing fh
    JOIN whole_room wr
      ON wr.housing_id = fh.id
    JOIN acquisition a
      ON a.housing_id = fh.id
    JOIN rental r
      ON r.housing_id = fh.id
     AND r.room_id = wr.room_id
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
      ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id
     AND ap.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
)
SELECT
    p.housing_id,
    p.house_code,
    p.property_address,
    p.building,
    p.unit_name,
    p.room_number,
    p.acquisition_price,
    p.rental_price,
    p.price_difference,
    CASE
        WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY p.price_difference DESC) = 1 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS is_most_profitable
FROM profit p
ORDER BY p.price_difference DESC, p.housing_id ASC;

results.question: 智能电表的充值记录统计一下，谁充的最多？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.payer_type,
  t.payer_id,
  t.recharge_count,
  t.total_recharge_amount
FROM (
  SELECT
    s.payer_type,
    s.payer_id,
    s.recharge_count,
    s.total_recharge_amount,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY s.total_recharge_amount DESC) AS rk
  FROM (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN r.recharge_type = 1 THEN '经纪人'
        WHEN r.recharge_type = 2 THEN '租客'
        ELSE '未知'
      END AS payer_type,
      CASE
        WHEN r.recharge_type = 1 THEN r.creater_id
        WHEN r.recharge_type = 2 THEN r.tenant_id
        ELSE NULL
      END AS payer_id,
      COUNT(*) AS recharge_count,
      SUM(r.recharge_amount) AS total_recharge_amount
    FROM qft_smart_electricity_meter_recharge_record r
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND (
        (r.recharge_type = 1 AND r.creater_id IS NOT NULL)
        OR (r.recharge_type = 2 AND r.tenant_id IS NOT NULL)
      )
    GROUP BY
      CASE
        WHEN r.recharge_type = 1 THEN '经纪人'
        WHEN r.recharge_type = 2 THEN '租客'
        ELSE '未知'
      END,
      CASE
        WHEN r.recharge_type = 1 THEN r.creater_id
        WHEN r.recharge_type = 2 THEN r.tenant_id
        ELSE NULL
      END
  ) s
) t
WHERE t.rk = 1
ORDER BY t.total_recharge_amount DESC, t.recharge_count DESC;

results.question: 整租和合租对比一下，谁更赚钱？
results.generated_sql:
WITH room_map AS (
    SELECT
        room_id,
        MAX(business_type) AS business_type
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND business_type IN (2, 3)
      AND room_id IS NOT NULL
      AND room_id <> 0
    GROUP BY room_id
),
housing_map AS (
    SELECT
        housing_id,
        MAX(business_type) AS business_type
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND business_type IN (2, 3)
      AND housing_id IS NOT NULL
      AND housing_id <> 0
    GROUP BY housing_id
),
finance_base AS (
    SELECT
        f.id,
        COALESCE(room_map.business_type, housing_map.business_type) AS business_type,
        f.nature,
        IFNULL(f.money, 0) AS money
    FROM qft_finance f
    LEFT JOIN room_map
        ON f.room_id = room_map.room_id
    LEFT JOIN housing_map
        ON f.housing_id = housing_map.housing_id
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.cashier = 1
      AND f.source_type IN (2, 3)
      AND COALESCE(room_map.business_type, housing_map.business_type) IN (2, 3)
),
summary AS (
    SELECT
        business_type,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS total_income,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS total_expense,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS net_profit
    FROM finance_base
    GROUP BY business_type
)
SELECT
    CASE business_type
        WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
        WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
    END AS business_mode,
    total_income,
    total_expense,
    net_profit,
    ROUND(net_profit / NULLIF(total_income, 0), 4) AS profit_margin,
    CASE
        WHEN net_profit = MAX(net_profit) OVER () THEN '更赚钱'
        ELSE '较低'
    END AS compare_result
FROM summary
ORDER BY net_profit DESC;

    ON ti.tenants_id = t.id
   AND t.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_focus_room r
    ON t.room_id = r.id
   AND ti.room_id = r.id
   AND r.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_focus_housing h
    ON r.housing_id = h.id
   AND ti.housing_id = h.id
   AND h.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE ti.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ti.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND ti.collection_date IS NOT NULL
  AND ti.repay_pay_date IS NOT NULL
  AND ti.repay_pay_date > ti.collection_date
  AND ti.pay_status IN (2, 3)
  AND IFNULL(ti.real_money, 0) > 0
GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.phone, h.house_code, r.room_number
ORDER BY max_overdue_days DESC, overdue_paid_bill_count DESC, last_actual_pay_date DESC;

results.question: 每个小区的投资回报情况怎么样？装修花了多少，租金收回来多少了？
results.generated_sql:
WITH property_finance AS (
    SELECT
        f.property_id,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN f.nature = 0
                     AND IFNULL(f.cashier, 0) = 1
                     AND (
                         COALESCE(f.finance_abstract, '') REGEXP '装修|翻新|改造|软装|硬装'
                         OR COALESCE(f.remark, '') REGEXP '装修|翻新|改造|软装|硬装'
                     )
                THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0)
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS renovation_cost,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN f.nature = 1
                     AND IFNULL(f.cashier, 0) = 1
                     AND (
                         COALESCE(f.finance_abstract, '') REGEXP '租金|房租'
                         OR COALESCE(f.remark, '') REGEXP '租金|房租'
                     )
                THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0)
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS rent_received
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.property_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY f.property_id
)
SELECT
    a.area_name AS area_name,
    ap.property_adrr AS property_name,
    ROUND(IFNULL(pf.renovation_cost, 0), 2) AS renovation_cost,
    ROUND(IFNULL(pf.rent_received, 0), 2) AS rent_received,
    ROUND(IFNULL(pf.rent_received, 0) - IFNULL(pf.renovation_cost, 0), 2) AS net_return,
    CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(pf.renovation_cost, 0) > 0
        THEN ROUND(IFNULL(pf.rent_received, 0) / pf.renovation_cost * 100, 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS roi_rate_pct,
    CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(pf.renovation_cost, 0) > 0
             AND IFNULL(pf.rent_received, 0) >= IFNULL(pf.renovation_cost, 0)
        THEN '已回本'
        WHEN IFNULL(pf.renovation_cost, 0) > 0
             AND IFNULL(pf.rent_received, 0) < IFNULL(pf.renovation_cost, 0)
        THEN '未回本'
        WHEN IFNULL(pf.renovation_cost, 0) = 0
             AND IFNULL(pf.rent_received, 0) > 0
        THEN '未识别到装修投入'
        ELSE '暂无数据'
    END AS investment_status
FROM qft_area_property ap
LEFT JOIN qft_area a
    ON ap.area_id = a.id
   AND a.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(a.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN property_finance pf
    ON pf.property_id = ap.id
WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM qft_focus_housing h
      WHERE h.property_adrr = ap.id
        AND h.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
  )
ORDER BY roi_rate_pct DESC, rent_received DESC, renovation_cost DESC, ap.id;

results.question: 有没有哪个门店在吃老本？就是新签租客少、但还靠老租客撑着的。
results.generated_sql:
WITH focus_tenant_info_latest AS (
    SELECT
        fi.company_id,
        fi.tenant_id,
        fi.lease_starttime,
        fi.lease_endtime,
        fi.tenants_contract_nature,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY fi.company_id, fi.tenant_id
            ORDER BY fi.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_info fi
    WHERE fi.company_id = 1001
),
tenant_pool AS (
    SELECT
        h.store_id,
        CONCAT('focus_', t.id) AS tenant_key,
        l.lease_starttime,
        l.lease_endtime,
        l.tenants_contract_nature
    FROM qft_focus_tenants t
    JOIN focus_tenant_info_latest l
        ON l.company_id = t.company_id
       AND l.tenant_id = t.id
       AND l.rn = 1
    JOIN qft_focus_room r
        ON r.id = t.room_id
       AND r.company_id = t.company_id
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON h.id = r.housing_id
       AND h.company_id = t.company_id
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE t.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        h.store_id,
        CONCAT('joint_', t.id) AS tenant_key,
        t.lease_starttime,
        t.lease_endtime,
        t.tenants_contract_nature
    FROM qft_joint_tenants t
    JOIN qft_joint_room r
        ON r.id = t.room_id
       AND r.company_id = t.company_id
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_joint_housing h
        ON h.id = r.housing_id
       AND h.company_id = t.company_id
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE t.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
),
store_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN tenants_contract_nature = 1
                 AND lease_starttime >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
                 AND lease_starttime < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
                THEN 1 ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS new_sign_30d_cnt,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN lease_starttime <= NOW()
                 AND lease_endtime >= NOW()
                THEN 1 ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS active_tenant_cnt,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN lease_starttime < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
                 AND lease_endtime >= NOW()
                THEN 1 ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS active_old_tenant_cnt
    FROM tenant_pool
    GROUP BY store_id
),
bench AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(new_sign_30d_cnt) AS avg_new_sign_30d_cnt,
        AVG(
            CASE
                WHEN active_tenant_cnt > 0 THEN active_old_tenant_cnt / active_tenant_cnt
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS avg_old_tenant_ratio
    FROM store_metrics
)
SELECT
    sm.store_id,
    sm.new_sign_30d_cnt,
    sm.active_tenant_cnt,
    sm.active_old_tenant_cnt,
    ROUND(sm.active_old_tenant_cnt / NULLIF(sm.active_tenant_cnt, 0), 4) AS old_tenant_support_ratio,
    CASE
        WHEN sm.new_sign_30d_cnt = 0 THEN 9999.00
        ELSE ROUND(sm.active_old_tenant_cnt / sm.new_sign_30d_cnt, 2)
    END AS old_to_new_ratio
FROM store_metrics sm
CROSS JOIN bench b
WHERE sm.active_tenant_cnt >= 10
  AND sm.new_sign_30d_cnt < b.avg_new_sign_30d_cnt
  AND sm.active_old_tenant_cnt / NULLIF(sm.active_tenant_cnt, 0) > b.avg_old_tenant_ratio
ORDER BY
    sm.new_sign_30d_cnt ASC,
    old_tenant_support_ratio DESC,
    sm.active_old_tenant_cnt DESC;

results.question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH room_stats AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS leased_rooms,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS vacant_rooms
    FROM qft_focus_parent_room r
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON r.housing_id = h.id
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
),
collection_stats AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(SUM(fi.trade_money), 0) AS receivable_income,
        COALESCE(SUM(fi.real_money), 0) AS received_income
    FROM qft_finance f
    JOIN qft_finance_item fi
        ON fi.finance_id = f.id
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fi.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND fi.nature = 1
      AND IFNULL(f.source_type, 0) IN (2, 5)
),
metrics AS (
    SELECT
        rs.total_rooms,
        rs.leased_rooms,
        rs.vacant_rooms,
        ROUND(rs.leased_rooms / NULLIF(rs.total_rooms, 0) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate,
        ROUND(rs.vacant_rooms / NULLIF(rs.total_rooms, 0) * 100, 2) AS vacancy_rate,
        cs.receivable_income,
        cs.received_income,
        ROUND(cs.received_income / NULLIF(cs.receivable_income, 0) * 100, 2) AS collection_rate
    FROM room_stats rs
    CROSS JOIN collection_stats cs
)
SELECT
    total_rooms,
    leased_rooms,
    vacant_rooms,
    occupancy_rate,
    vacancy_rate,
    receivable_income,
    received_income,
    collection_rate,
    ROUND(occupancy_rate * 0.40 + collection_rate * 0.40 + (100 - vacancy_rate) * 0.20, 2) AS business_health_score,
    CASE
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 95 AND collection_rate >= 95 AND vacancy_rate <= 5 THEN '优秀'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 90 AND collection_rate >= 90 AND vacancy_rate <= 10 THEN '良好'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 80 AND collection_rate >= 80 AND vacancy_rate <= 20 THEN '一般'
        ELSE '偏弱'
    END AS business_health_level,
    CASE
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 95 AND collection_rate >= 95 AND vacancy_rate <= 5 THEN '整体业务健康度优秀，出租稳定、回款强、空置可控'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 90 AND collection_rate >= 90 AND vacancy_rate <= 10 THEN '整体业务健康度良好，出租与回款表现稳健，空置率处于合理区间'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 80 AND collection_rate >= 80 AND vacancy_rate <= 20 THEN '整体业务健康度一般，建议继续提升出租效率并加强回款跟进'
        ELSE '整体业务健康度偏弱，空置或回款压力较大，建议优先优化出租转化与催收管理'
    END AS comprehensive_evaluation
FROM metrics;

execution_result.comprehensive_evaluation: 整体业务健康度偏弱，空置或回款压力较大，建议优先优化出租转化与催收管理

SELECT
  jt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
  jt.phone AS 联系电话,
  jh.house_code AS 房源编号,
  CONCAT(
    COALESCE(ap.property_adrr, ''),
    COALESCE(jh.building, ''),
    COALESCE(jh.unit_name, ''),
    COALESCE(jh.door_number, ''),
    ' ',
    COALESCE(jr.room_number, '')
  ) AS 欠费房间,
  SUM(COALESCE(jti.debt_money, 0)) AS 欠费金额
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
JOIN qft_store s
  ON s.id = jti.store_id
 AND s.company_id = 1001
 AND s.is_delete = 0
 AND s.name = '城东门店'
JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
  ON jti.tenants_id = jt.id
 AND jt.company_id = 1001
 AND jt.is_delete = 0
JOIN qft_joint_room jr
  ON jti.room_id = jr.id
 AND jt.room_id = jr.id
 AND jr.company_id = 1001
 AND jr.is_delete = 0
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
  ON jti.housing_id = jh.id
 AND jr.housing_id = jh.id
 AND jh.store_id = jti.store_id
 AND jh.company_id = 1001
 AND jh.is_delete = 0
JOIN qft_area_property ap
  ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
 AND ap.company_id = 1001
 AND ap.is_delete = 0
WHERE jti.company_id = 1001
  AND jti.is_delete = 0

  jh.unit_name,

results.question: 帮我统计一下，整租房源的托管期限都是多久？快到期的有哪些？
results.generated_sql:
WITH base_housing AS (
    SELECT
        jh.id,
        jh.house_code,
        CONCAT_WS('', IFNULL(ap.property_adrr, ''), IFNULL(jh.building, ''), IFNULL(jh.unit_name, ''), IFNULL(jh.door_number, '')) AS house_address,
        jh.hosting_create_time,
        jh.hosting_end_time,
        IFNULL(jh.contract_year, 0) AS contract_year,
        IFNULL(jh.contract_month, 0) AS contract_month,
        IFNULL(jh.contract_day, 0) AS contract_day
    FROM qft_joint_housing jh
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND ap.is_delete = 0
    WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
      AND jh.is_delete = 0
      AND jh.is_check_out = 0
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
          WHERE jti.housing_id = jh.id
            AND jti.company_id = 1001
            AND jti.is_delete = 0
            AND jti.business_type = 2
      )
),
result_set AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS sort_flag,
        bh.contract_year AS sort_year,
        bh.contract_month AS sort_month,
        bh.contract_day AS sort_day,
        NULL AS sort_remaining_days,
        NULL AS sort_end_time,
        NULL AS sort_housing_id,
        '托管期限统计' AS 结果类型,
        CONCAT(bh.contract_year, '年', bh.contract_month, '月', bh.contract_day, '天') AS 托管期限,
        COUNT(DISTINCT bh.id) AS 房源数量,
        ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF(DATE(bh.hosting_end_time), DATE(bh.hosting_create_time))), 0) AS 平均托管天数,
        NULL AS 房源ID,
        NULL AS 房源编号,
        NULL AS 房源地址,
        NULL AS 托管开始时间,
        NULL AS 托管到期时间,
        NULL AS 剩余天数
    FROM base_housing bh
    GROUP BY bh.contract_year, bh.contract_month, bh.contract_day

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        2 AS sort_flag,
        NULL AS sort_year,
        NULL AS sort_month,
        NULL AS sort_day,
        DATEDIFF(DATE(bh.hosting_end_time), CURDATE()) AS sort_remaining_days,
        bh.hosting_end_time AS sort_end_time,
        bh.id AS sort_housing_id,
        '快到期房源' AS 结果类型,
        CONCAT(bh.contract_year, '年', bh.contract_month, '月', bh.contract_day, '天') AS 托管期限,
        NULL AS 房源数量,
        NULL AS 平均托管天数,
        bh.id AS 房源ID,
        bh.house_code AS 房源编号,
        bh.house_address AS 房源地址,
        bh.hosting_create_time AS 托管开始时间,
        bh.hosting_end_time AS 托管到期时间,
        DATEDIFF(DATE(bh.hosting_end_time), CURDATE()) AS 剩余天数
    FROM base_housing bh
    WHERE DATE(bh.hosting_end_time) BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
)
SELECT
    结果类型,
    托管期限,
    房源数量,
    平均托管天数,
    房源ID,
    房源编号,
    房源地址,
    托管开始时间,
    托管到期时间,
    剩余天数
FROM result_set
ORDER BY
    sort_flag ASC,
    sort_year ASC,
    sort_month ASC,
    sort_day ASC,
    sort_remaining_days ASC,
    sort_end_time ASC,
    sort_housing_id ASC;

        ON fh.id = ftr.housing_id
       AND fh.company_id = 1001
       AND fh.is_delete = 0
    WHERE ftr.salesman_id IS NOT NULL
      AND ftr.salesman_id <> 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        jh.id AS task_id,
        jh.salesman_id AS employee_id,
        NULL AS employee_name,
        'joint_housing' AS task_type
    FROM qft_joint_housing jh
    WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
      AND jh.is_delete = 0
      AND jh.salesman_id IS NOT NULL
      AND jh.salesman_id <> 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        jt.id AS task_id,
        jt.salesman_id AS employee_id,
        NULL AS employee_name,
        'joint_tenants' AS task_type
    FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
    WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
      AND jt.is_delete = 0
      AND jt.salesman_id IS NOT NULL
      AND jt.salesman_id <> 0
),
stats AS (
    SELECT
        eb.employee_id,
        COALESCE(MAX(NULLIF(tu.employee_name, '')), CAST(eb.employee_id AS CHAR)) AS employee_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tu.task_type = 'housing_renewal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS housing_renewal_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tu.task_type = 'tenant_renewal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tenant_renewal_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tu.task_type = 'room_earnest' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS room_earnest_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tu.task_type = 'focus_tenants_info' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS focus_tenants_info_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tu.task_type = 'focus_trust' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS focus_trust_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tu.task_type = 'joint_housing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS joint_housing_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN tu.task_type = 'joint_tenants' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS joint_tenants_count,
        COUNT(tu.task_id) AS total_task_count
    FROM employee_base eb
    LEFT JOIN task_union tu
        ON eb.employee_id = tu.employee_id
    GROUP BY eb.employee_id
)
SELECT
    s.employee_id,
    s.employee_name,
    s.housing_renewal_count,
    s.tenant_renewal_count,
    s.room_earnest_count,
    s.focus_tenants_info_count,
    s.focus_trust_count,
    s.joint_housing_count,
    s.joint_tenants_count,
    s.total_task_count,
    CASE
        WHEN s.total_task_count = m.max_total_task_count THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS is_busiest
FROM stats s
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(total_task_count) AS max_total_task_count
    FROM stats
) m
ORDER BY s.total_task_count DESC, s.employee_id;

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE month_list AS (
    SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE) AS month_start
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE_ADD(month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    FROM month_list
    WHERE month_start < CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
),
finance_agg AS (
    SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE) AS month_start,
           SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS income,
           SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS expend
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND account_date >= CAST(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
      AND account_date < DATE_ADD(CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    GROUP BY CAST(DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
)
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS month,
       IFNULL(f.income, 0) AS income,
       IFNULL(f.expend, 0) AS expend
FROM month_list m
LEFT JOIN finance_agg f ON m.month_start = f.month_start
ORDER BY m.month_start;

results.question: 哪个小区的房子好租？哪个不好租？
results.generated_sql:
WITH community_stats AS (
  SELECT
    ap.id AS community_id,
    ap.property_adrr AS community_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) AS room_total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(fr.is_lease, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_room_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) - SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(fr.is_lease, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vacant_room_cnt,
    ROUND(
      SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(fr.is_lease, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id), 0),
      4
    ) AS rental_heat
  FROM qft_area_property ap
  JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
    ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id
   AND fh.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  JOIN qft_focus_room fr
    ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
   AND fr.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY rental_heat DESC, room_total DESC, community_id) AS rn_good,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY rental_heat ASC, room_total ASC, community_id) AS rn_bad
  FROM community_stats
)
SELECT rank_type, community_id, community_name, room_total, leased_room_cnt, vacant_room_cnt, rental_heat
FROM (
  SELECT '好租' AS rank_type, community_id, community_name, room_total, leased_room_cnt, vacant_room_cnt, rental_heat, rn_good AS rn
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rn_good <= 10
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '不好租' AS rank_type, community_id, community_name, room_total, leased_room_cnt, vacant_room_cnt, rental_heat, rn_bad AS rn
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rn_bad <= 10
) t
ORDER BY CASE WHEN rank_type = '好租' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, rn;

results.question: 三个门店哪个出租率最好？
results.step1_raw:
{
  "entities": [
    {
      "text": "三个门店",
      "type": "store",
      "normalized": "3个门店"
    },
    {
      "text": "出租率",
      "type": "metric",
      "normalized": "出租率"
    }
  ],
  "query_goal": "rank",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": [
    "store",
    "housing",
    "room",
    "tenants",
    "contract",
    "whole_housing",
    "joint_housing",
    "focus_housing",
    "whole_room",
    "joint_room",
    "focus_room",
    "whole_tenants",
    "joi
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    h.store_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_room_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS occupied_room_count,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS occupancy_rate
FROM qft_focus_room r
JOIN qft_focus_housing h
    ON r.housing_id = h.id
WHERE r.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND h.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY h.store_id
ORDER BY occupancy_rate DESC, h.store_id ASC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: 现在整体出租率怎么样？
results.generated_sql:
WITH room_stats AS (
    SELECT
        '集中' AS business_type,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_sublease_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS occupied_rooms
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON fh.id = fr.housing_id
       AND fh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '整租' AS business_type,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_sublease_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS occupied_rooms
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
        ON wh.id = wr.housing_id
       AND wh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(wh.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(wr.transfer_status, 0) <> 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_type,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending_sublease_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS occupied_rooms
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jh.id = jr.housing_id
       AND jh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(jh.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(jr.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
)
SELECT
    business_type,
    total_rooms,
    rented_rooms,
    pending_sublease_rooms,
    occupied_rooms,
    CONCAT(ROUND(occupied_rooms * 100 / NULLIF(total_rooms, 0), 2), '%') AS occupancy_rate
FROM (
    SELECT
        business_type,
        total_rooms,
        rented_rooms,
        pending_sublease_rooms,
        occupied_rooms
    FROM room_stats

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '整体' AS business_type,
        SUM(total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(rented_rooms) AS rented_rooms,
        SUM(pending_sublease_rooms) AS pending_sublease_rooms,
        SUM(occupied_rooms) AS occupied_rooms
    FROM room_stats
) t
ORDER BY FIELD(business_type, '集中', '整租', '合租', '整体');

results.question: 翡翠城那边有多少套房子？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  ap.property_adrr AS property_name,
  SUM(t.house_count) AS total_house_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN t.business_type = '集中' THEN t.house_count ELSE 0 END) AS focus_house_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN t.business_type = '整租' THEN t.house_count ELSE 0 END) AS whole_house_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN t.business_type = '合租' THEN t.house_count ELSE 0 END) AS joint_house_count
FROM qft_area_property ap
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT 
    property_adrr,
    '集中' AS business_type,
    COUNT(*) AS house_count
  FROM qft_focus_housing
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(is_check_out,0) = 0
  GROUP BY property_adrr

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 
    property_adrr,
    '整租' AS business_type,
    COUNT(*) AS house_count
  FROM qft_whole_housing
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(is_check_out,0) = 0
  GROUP BY property_adrr

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 
    property_adrr,
    '合租' AS business_type,
    COUNT(*) AS house_count
  FROM qft_joint_housing
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(is_check_out,0) = 0
  GROUP BY property_adrr
) t ON t.property_adrr = ap.id
WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND ap.property_adrr LIKE '%翡翠城%'
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
ORDER BY total_house_count DESC;

results.question: 张三租的哪间房？月租多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  '整租' AS 业务类型,
  wt.id AS 租客ID,
  wt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
  CONCAT_WS(' ', ap.property_adrr, wh.building, wh.unit_name, wh.door_number) AS 租住房间,
  CASE
    WHEN wt.square_type = 4 AND wt.daily_prices IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(wt.daily_prices * 30, 2)
    ELSE wt.lease_price
  END AS 月租
FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_room wr
  ON wt.room_id = wr.id
  AND wr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
  ON wr.housing_id = wh.id
  AND wh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
  ON wh.property_adrr = ap.id
  AND ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND wt.tenants_name = '张三'

UNION ALL

SELECT
  '合租' AS 业务类型,
  jt.id AS 租客ID,
  jt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
  CONCAT_WS(' ', ap.property_adrr, jh.building, jh.unit_name, jh.door_number, jr.room_number) AS 租住房间,
  CASE
    WHEN jt.square_type = 4 AND jt.daily_prices IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(jt.daily_prices * 30, 2)
    ELSE jt.lease_price
  END AS 月租
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room jr
  ON jt.room_id = jr.id
  AND jr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
  ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
  AND jh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
  ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
  AND ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND jt.tenants_name = '张三'

UNION ALL

SELECT
  '集中' AS 业务类型,
  ft.id AS 租客ID,
  ft.name AS 租客姓名,
  CONCAT_WS(' ', ap.property_adrr, fh.building, fh.unit_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(fr.child_room_number, ''), fr.room_number)) AS 租住房间,
  CASE
    WHEN fti.square_type = 4 AND fti.daily_prices IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(fti.daily_prices * 30, 2)
    ELSE fti.lease_price
  END AS 月租
FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT t1.*
  FROM qft_focus_tenants_info t1
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT tenant_id, MAX(id) AS max_id
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_info
    WHERE company_id = 1001
    GROUP BY tenant_id
  ) t2 ON t1.id = t2.max_id
  WHERE t1.company_id = 1001
) fti
  ON fti.tenant_id = ft.id
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room fr
  ON ft.room_id = fr.id
  AND fr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
  ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
  AND fh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
  ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id
  AND ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND ft.name = '张三';

results.question: 刘洋手上管了几套房源？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  u.id AS user_id,
  u.realname,
  COUNT(*) AS housing_count
FROM qft_butler b
JOIN qft_user u
  ON b.user_id = u.id
  AND u.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(u.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
  ON b.businessType = 1
  AND b.housing_id = fh.id
  AND fh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND fh.is_check_out = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
  ON b.businessType = 2
  AND b.housing_id = wh.id
  AND wh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND wh.is_check_out = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
  ON b.businessType = 3
  AND b.housing_id = jh.id
  AND jh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND jh.is_check_out = 0
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
  AND u.realname = '刘洋'
  AND (
    (b.businessType = 1 AND fh.id IS NOT NULL)
    OR (b.businessType = 2 AND wh.id IS NOT NULL)
    OR (b.businessType = 3 AND jh.id IS NOT NULL)
  )
GROUP BY u.id, u.realname;

  AND business_type = 3

results.question: 集中式现在签了多少个租客？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS current_focus_tenant_count
FROM qft_focus_tenants t
INNER JOIN qft_focus_room r
    ON r.id = t.room_id
   AND r.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing h
    ON h.id = r.housing_id
   AND h.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_tenants_check_out co
    ON co.tenants_id = t.id
   AND co.housing_type = 1
   AND co.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(co.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND IFNULL(co.is_revert, 0) = 0
   AND co.approval_state = 1
LEFT JOIN qft_tenants_relet tr
    ON tr.history_tenants_id = t.id
   AND tr.housing_type = 1
   AND tr.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(tr.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND IFNULL(tr.is_revert, 0) = 0
   AND IFNULL(tr.is_valid, 0) = 1
WHERE t.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND co.id IS NULL
  AND tr.id IS NULL;

results.question: 翡翠城2栋2-1-101租出去了没？
results.generated_sql:
WITH target AS (
  SELECT REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE('翡翠城2栋2-1-101','栋',''),'单元',''),'号',''),'-',''),' ',''),'　','') AS addr
)
SELECT
  business_type,
  housing_id,
  room_id,
  full_address,
  rent_status,
  rented_room_count,
  total_room_count
FROM (
  SELECT
    '整租' AS business_type,
    wh.id AS housing_id,
    wr.id AS room_id,
    CONCAT(IFNULL(ap.property_adrr,''),IFNULL(wh.building,''),IFNULL(wh.unit_name,''),IFNULL(wh.door_number,'')) AS full_address,
    CASE
      WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN '已租出'
      WHEN wr.is_lease = 2 THEN '待转租'
      ELSE '未租出'
    END AS rent_status,
    CASE WHEN wr.is_lease IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS rented_room_count,
    1 AS total_room_count
  FROM qft_whole_housing wh
  JOIN qft_whole_room wr
    ON wr.housing_id = wh.id
   AND wr.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0
  JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON ap.id = wh.property_adrr
   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
  CROSS JOIN target t
  WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0
    AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CONCAT(IFNULL(ap.property_adrr,''),IFNULL(wh.building,''),IFNULL(wh.unit_name,''),IFNULL(wh.door_number,'')),'栋',''),'单元',''),'号',''),'-',''),' ',''),'　','') = t.addr

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '合租' AS business_type,
    jh.id AS housing_id,
    NULL AS room_id,
    CONCAT(IFNULL(ap.property_adrr,''),IFNULL(jh.building,''),IFNULL(jh.unit_name,''),IFNULL(jh.door_number,'')) AS full_address,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN '未租出'
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(1) THEN '已租满'
      ELSE CONCAT('部分租出(', SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), '/', COUNT(1), ')')
    END AS rent_status,
    SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_room_count,
    COUNT(1) AS total_room_count
  FROM qft_joint_housing jh
  JOIN qft_joint_room jr
    ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
   AND jr.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0
  JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON ap.id = jh.property_adrr
   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
  CROSS JOIN target t
  WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete,0) = 0
    AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CONCAT(IFNULL(ap.property_adrr,''),IFNULL(jh.building,''),IFNULL(jh.unit_name,''),IFNULL(jh.door_number,'')),'栋',''),'单元',''),'号',''),'-',''),' ',''),'　','') = t.addr
  GROUP BY jh.id, ap.property_adrr, jh.building, jh.unit_name, jh.door_number

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '集中' AS business_type,
    fh.id AS housing_id,
    fr.id AS room_id,
    CONCAT(IFNULL(ap.property_adrr,''),IFNULL(fh.building,''),IFNULL(fh.unit_name,''),IFNULL(fr.room_number,'')) AS full_address,
    CASE
      WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN '已租出'
      WHEN fr.is_lease = 2 THEN '待转租'
      ELSE '未租出'
    END AS rent_status,
    CASE WHEN fr.is_lease IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS rented_room_count,
    1 AS total_room_count
  FROM qft_focus_housing fh
  JOIN qft_focus_room fr
    ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
   AND fr.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete,0) = 0
  JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON ap.id = fh.property_adrr
   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
  CROSS JOIN target t
  WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete,0) = 0
    AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(CONCAT(IFNULL(ap.property_adrr,''),IFNULL(fh.building,''),IFNULL(fh.unit_name,''),IFNULL(fr.room_number,'')),'栋',''),'单元',''),'号',''),'-',''),' ',''),'　','') = t.addr
) s
ORDER BY FIELD(business_type,'整租','合租','集中'), housing_id, room_id;

  LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap

    GROUP BY tenants_id

  WHERE t.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0

  LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap

  LEFT JOIN (

      tenants_id AS tenant_id,

      SUM(real_money) AS due_paid_money,
      SUM(debt_money) AS arrears_money,

  WHERE t.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND t.tenants_name = '张三'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '合租' AS business_type,
    jh.id AS house_id,
    jr.id AS room_id,
    t.id AS tenant_id,
    t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
    t.phone,
    CONCAT_WS(' ', ap.property_adrr, jh.building, jh.unit_name, jh.door_number, jr.room_number) AS address,
    jb.due_receivable_money,
    jb.due_paid_money,
    jb.arrears_money,

    jb.latest_due_date
  FROM qft_joint_tenants t
  LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room jr
    ON jr.id = t.room_id
   AND jr.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
    ON jh.id = jr.housing_id
   AND jh.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON ap.id = jh.property_adrr
   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      tenants_id AS tenant_id,
      SUM(final_money) AS due_receivable_money,
      SUM(real_money) AS due_paid_money,
      SUM(debt_money) AS arrears_money,

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE months AS (
    SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS month_start
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
    FROM months
    WHERE month_start < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
),
finance_stat AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS month_start,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS income_money,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS expend_money
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
      AND account_date < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
    GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m-01')
)
SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS stat_month,
    IFNULL(f.income_money, 0) AS income_money,
    IFNULL(f.expend_money, 0) AS expend_money
FROM months m
LEFT JOIN finance_stat f ON m.month_start = f.month_start
ORDER BY m.month_start;

results.question: 哪个小区的房子好租？哪个不好租？
results.generated_sql:
WITH room_base AS (
    SELECT
        wh.property_adrr AS property_id,
        CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS rented_room,
        CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(wr.cumte_vacancy_day, 0) END AS vacant_days
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
        ON wr.housing_id = wh.id
       AND wh.company_id = 1001
       AND wh.is_delete = 0
       AND wh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
      AND wr.is_delete = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        jh.property_adrr AS property_id,
        CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS rented_room,
        CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(jr.cumte_vacancy_day, 0) END AS vacant_days
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
       AND jh.company_id = 1001
       AND jh.is_delete = 0
       AND jh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND jr.is_delete = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        fh.property_adrr AS property_id,
        CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS rented_room,
        CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(fr.cumte_vacancy_day, 0) END AS vacant_days
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
       AND fh.company_id = 1001
       AND fh.is_delete = 0
       AND fh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND fr.is_delete = 0
),
room_agg AS (
    SELECT
        property_id,
        COUNT(*) AS total_room_count,
        SUM(rented_room) AS rented_room_count,
        COUNT(*) - SUM(rented_room) AS vacant_room_count,
        ROUND(SUM(rented_room) / COUNT(*), 4) AS lease_rate,
        ROUND(AVG(vacant_days), 2) AS avg_vacant_days
    FROM room_base
    WHERE property_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY property_id
),
property_stats AS (
    SELECT
        ap.id AS property_id,
        ap.property_adrr AS property_name,
        ra.total_room_count,
        ra.rented_room_count,
        ra.vacant_room_count,
        ra.lease_rate,
        COALESCE(ra.avg_vacant_days, 0) AS avg_vacant_days
    FROM room_agg ra
    INNER JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON ra.property_id = ap.id
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND ap.is_delete = 0
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        property_id,
        property_name,
        total_room_count,
        rented_room_count,
        vacant_room_count,
        lease_rate,
        avg_vacant_days,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY lease_rate DESC, avg_vacant_days ASC, rented_room_count DESC, total_room_count DESC, property_id
        ) AS good_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY lease_rate ASC, avg_vacant_days DESC, vacant_room_count DESC, total_room_count DESC, property_id
        ) AS bad_rank
    FROM property_stats
)
SELECT
    rent_level,
    sort_rank,
    property_id,
    property_name,
    total_room_count,
    rented_room_count,
    vacant_room_count,
    ROUND(lease_rate * 100, 2) AS lease_rate_pct,
    avg_vacant_days
FROM (
    SELECT
        '好租' AS rent_level,
        good_rank AS sort_rank,
        property_id,
        property_name,
        total_room_count,
        rented_room_count,
        vacant_room_count,
        lease_rate,
        avg_vacant_days
    FROM ranked
    WHERE good_rank <= 10

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '不好租' AS rent_level,
        bad_rank AS sort_rank,
        property_id,
        property_name,
        total_room_count,
        rented_room_count,
        vacant_room_count,
        lease_rate,
        avg_vacant_days
    FROM ranked
    WHERE bad_rank <= 10
) t
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN rent_level = '好租' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
    sort_rank;

results.question: 三个门店哪个出租率最好？
results.generated_sql:
WITH room_union AS (
    SELECT
        fh.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON fh.id = fr.housing_id
       AND fh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY fh.store_id

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        wh.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
        ON wh.id = wr.housing_id
       AND wh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY wh.store_id

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        jh.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jh.id = jr.housing_id
       AND jh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY jh.store_id
),
store_stats AS (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(rented_rooms) AS rented_rooms
    FROM room_union
    GROUP BY store_id
)
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,
    IFNULL(ss.rented_rooms, 0) AS rented_rooms,
    IFNULL(ss.total_rooms, 0) AS total_rooms,
    CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(ss.total_rooms, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(IFNULL(ss.rented_rooms, 0) / ss.total_rooms * 100, 2)
    END AS rental_rate
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN store_stats ss
    ON ss.store_id = s.id
WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(ss.total_rooms, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE IFNULL(ss.rented_rooms, 0) / ss.total_rooms
    END DESC,
    IFNULL(ss.rented_rooms, 0) DESC,
    s.id ASC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: 每个门店的维修单情况怎么样？哪个最多？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.store_id,
  t.store_name,
  t.total_repair_count,
  t.unfinished_count,
  t.finished_count,
  t.no_progress_count,
  t.unreceived_count,
  t.received_count,
  t.unhandover_count,
  t.handovered_count,
  t.unreturn_visit_count,
  t.returned_visit_count,
  CASE WHEN t.total_repair_count = m.max_repair_count THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_max_repair_count
FROM (
  SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,
    COUNT(r.id) AS total_repair_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.repair_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unfinished_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.repair_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finished_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.repair_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_progress_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.receive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreceived_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.receive = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS received_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.intersection = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unhandover_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.intersection = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS handovered_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.return_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreturn_visit_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.return_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS returned_visit_count
  FROM qft_store s
  LEFT JOIN qft_room_repair r
    ON r.store_id = s.id
   AND r.company_id = 1001
   AND r.is_delete = 0
  WHERE s.company_id = 1001
    AND s.is_delete = 0
  GROUP BY s.id, s.name
) t
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT MAX(t2.total_repair_count) AS max_repair_count
  FROM (
    SELECT
      s.id AS store_id,
      COUNT(r.id) AS total_repair_count
    FROM qft_store s
    LEFT JOIN qft_room_repair r
      ON r.store_id = s.id
     AND r.company_id = 1001
     AND r.is_delete = 0
    WHERE s.company_id = 1001
      AND s.is_delete = 0
    GROUP BY s.id
  ) t2
) m
ORDER BY t.total_repair_count DESC, t.store_id ASC;

SELECT
  s.rented_house_count,
  s.total_price_diff,
  s.avg_price_diff,
  s.max_price_diff,
  t.housing_id AS top_housing_id,

  t.building AS top_building,
  t.unit_name AS top_unit_name,
  t.door_number AS top_door_number,
  t.landlord_name AS top_landlord_name,
  t.tenants_name AS top_tenants_name,
  t.housing_in_price AS top_housing_in_price,
  t.housing_out_price AS top_housing_out_price,
  t.price_diff AS top_price_diff
FROM (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS rented_house_count,
    SUM(base.price_diff) AS total_price_diff,
    AVG(base.price_diff) AS avg_price_diff,
    MAX(base.price_diff) AS max_price_diff
  FROM (
    SELECT
      h.id AS housing_id,
      h.house_code,
      ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
      h.building,
      h.unit_name,
      h.door_number,
      h.housing_name AS landlord_name,
      ct.tenants_name,
      h.joe_price AS housing_in_price,
      ct.lease_price AS housing_out_price,
      IFNULL(ct.lease_price, 0) - IFNULL(h.joe_price, 0) AS price_diff
    FROM qft_whole_housing h
    JOIN qft_whole_room r
      ON r.housing_id = h.id
     AND r.company_id = 1001
     AND r.is_delete = 0
     AND r.is_lease = 1
    JOIN qft_whole_tenants ct
      ON ct.room_id = r.id
     AND ct.company_id = 1001
     AND ct.is_delete = 0
     AND ct.id = (
       SELECT t2.id
       FROM qft_whole_tenants t2
       WHERE t2.room_id = r.id
         AND t2.company_id = 1001
         AND t2.is_delete = 0
       ORDER BY t2.create_time DESC, t2.id DESC
       LIMIT 1
     )
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
      ON ap.id = h.property_adrr
     AND ap.company_id = 1001
     AND ap.is_delete = 0
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND h.is_delete = 0
      AND h.is_check_out = 0
  ) base
) s
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    base.housing_id,
    base.house_code,
    base.property_address,
    base.building,
    base.unit_name,
    base.door_number,
    base.landlord_name,
    base.tenants_name,
    base.housing_in_price,
    base.housing_out_price,
    base.price_diff
  FROM (
    SELECT
      h.id AS housing_id,
      h.house_code,
      ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
      h.building,
      h.unit_name,
      h.door_number,
      h.housing_name AS landlord_name,
      ct.tenants_name,
      h.joe_price AS housing_in_price,
      ct.lease_price AS housing_out_price,
      IFNULL(ct.lease_price, 0) - IFNULL(h.joe_price, 0) AS price_diff
    FROM qft_whole_housing h
    JOIN qft_whole_room r
      ON r.housing_id = h.id
     AND r.company_id = 1001
     AND r.is_delete = 0
     AND r.is_lease = 1
    JOIN qft_whole_tenants ct
      ON ct.room_id = r.id
     AND ct.company_id = 1001
     AND ct.is_delete = 0
     AND ct.id = (
       SELECT t2.id
       FROM qft_whole_tenants t2
       WHERE t2.room_id = r.id
         AND t2.company_id = 1001
         AND t2.is_delete = 0
       ORDER BY t2.create_time DESC, t2.id DESC
       LIMIT 1
     )
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
      ON ap.id = h.property_adrr
     AND ap.company_id = 1001
     AND ap.is_delete = 0
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND h.is_delete = 0
      AND h.is_check_out = 0
  ) base
  ORDER BY base.price_diff DESC, base.housing_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
) t
ON 1 = 1;

  WHERE company_id = 1001

results.question: 每个门店收了多少钱、付了多少钱？利润怎么样？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  s.id AS store_id,
  s.name AS store_name,
  IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 AND f.cashier = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income_money,
  IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 AND f.cashier = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expend_money,
  IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 AND f.cashier = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) - IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 AND f.cashier = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS profit_money

  ON f.store_id = s.id
  AND f.company_id = 1001

WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY profit_money DESC, s.id ASC;

results.question: 退房的租客都是什么原因退的？有没有违约的？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  result.row_type,
  result.housing_type_name,
  result.check_out_type_name,
  result.check_out_reason,
  result.checkout_count,
  result.breach_count,
  result.has_breach,
  result.check_out_id,
  result.housing_id,
  result.room_id,
  result.tenants_id,
  result.tenant_name,
  result.tenant_phone,
  result.check_out_time,
  result.liquidated_damages,
  result.defaulting_profit
FROM (
  SELECT
    1 AS sort_no,
    '退房原因统计' AS row_type,
    CASE tco.housing_type
      WHEN 1 THEN '集中整租'
      WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
      WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
      ELSE '其他'
    END AS housing_type_name,
    CASE tco.check_out_type
      WHEN 1 THEN '正常退房'
      WHEN 2 THEN '没有签成'
      WHEN 3 THEN '违约退房'
      WHEN 4 THEN '提前退房'
      WHEN 5 THEN '换房'
      ELSE '未知'
    END AS check_out_type_name,
    IFNULL(NULLIF(tco.check_out_reason, ''), '未填写') AS check_out_reason,
    COUNT(*) AS checkout_count,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN tco.check_out_type = 3 OR IFNULL(tco.liquidated_damages, 0) > 0 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS breach_count,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN tco.check_out_type = 3 OR IFNULL(tco.liquidated_damages, 0) > 0 THEN 1
          ELSE 0
        END
      ) > 0 THEN '有'
      ELSE '无'
    END AS has_breach,
    NULL AS check_out_id,
    NULL AS housing_id,
    NULL AS room_id,
    NULL AS tenants_id,
    NULL AS tenant_name,
    NULL AS tenant_phone,
    NULL AS check_out_time,
    NULL AS liquidated_damages,
    NULL AS defaulting_profit
  FROM qft_tenants_check_out tco
  WHERE tco.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(tco.is_delete, 0) = 0
  GROUP BY
    tco.housing_type,
    tco.check_out_type,
    IFNULL(NULLIF(tco.check_out_reason, ''), '未填写')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    2 AS sort_no,
    '违约汇总' AS row_type,
    '全部' AS housing_type_name,
    '全部' AS check_out_type_name,
    '全部' AS check_out_reason,
    COUNT(*) AS checkout_count,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN tco.check_out_type = 3 OR IFNULL(tco.liquidated_damages, 0) > 0 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS breach_count,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN tco.check_out_type = 3 OR IFNULL(tco.liquidated_damages, 0) > 0 THEN 1
          ELSE 0
        END
      ) > 0 THEN '有'
      ELSE '无'
    END AS has_breach,
    NULL AS check_out_id,
    NULL AS housing_id,
    NULL AS room_id,
    NULL AS tenants_id,
    NULL AS tenant_name,
    NULL AS tenant_phone,
    NULL AS check_out_time,
    NULL AS liquidated_damages,
    NULL AS defaulting_profit
  FROM qft_tenants_check_out tco
  WHERE tco.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(tco.is_delete, 0) = 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    3 AS sort_no,
    '违约明细' AS row_type,
    CASE tco.housing_type
      WHEN 1 THEN '集中整租'
      WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
      WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
      ELSE '其他'
    END AS housing_type_name,
    CASE tco.check_out_type
      WHEN 1 THEN '正常退房'
      WHEN 2 THEN '没有签成'
      WHEN 3 THEN '违约退房'
      WHEN 4 THEN '提前退房'
      WHEN 5 THEN '换房'
      ELSE '未知'
    END AS check_out_type_name,
    IFNULL(NULLIF(tco.check_out_reason, ''), '未填写') AS check_out_reason,
    NULL AS checkout_count,
    NULL AS breach_count,
    '有' AS has_breach,
    tco.id AS check_out_id,
    tco.housing_id,
    tco.room_id,
    tco.tenants_id,
    COALESCE(ft.name, wt.tenants_name, jt.tenants_name, CONCAT('租客ID:', tco.tenants_id)) AS tenant_name,
    COALESCE(ft.phone, wt.phone, jt.phone) AS tenant_phone,
    tco.check_out_time,
    IFNULL(tco.liquidated_damages, 0) AS liquidated_damages,
    IFNULL(tco.defaulting_profit, 0) AS defaulting_profit
  FROM qft_tenants_check_out tco
  LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft
    ON tco.housing_type = 1
   AND ft.id = tco.tenants_id
   AND ft.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt
    ON tco.housing_type = 2
   AND wt.id = tco.tenants_id
   AND wt.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
    ON tco.housing_type = 3
   AND jt.id = tco.tenants_id
   AND jt.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE tco.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(tco.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND (
      tco.check_out_type = 3
      OR IFNULL(tco.liquidated_damages, 0) > 0
    )
) AS result
ORDER BY
  result.sort_no,
  result.checkout_count DESC,
  result.housing_type_name,
  result.check_out_type_name,
  result.check_out_reason,
  result.check_out_time DESC,
  result.check_out_id DESC;

results.question: 总收入和总支出是多少？我们赚钱了还是亏钱了？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0.00) AS total_income,
  IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0.00) AS total_expenditure,
  IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money WHEN nature = 0 THEN -money ELSE 0 END), 0.00) AS net_profit,
  CASE
    WHEN IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money WHEN nature = 0 THEN -money ELSE 0 END), 0.00) > 0 THEN '赚钱了'
    WHEN IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money WHEN nature = 0 THEN -money ELSE 0 END), 0.00) < 0 THEN '亏钱了'
    ELSE '持平'
  END AS profit_status
FROM qft_finance
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND cashier = 1;

        ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(arrear_money, 0)), 2) AS expend_arrear
    FROM qft_joint_bill_expend
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(transfer_status, 0) <> 1
)
SELECT
    i.business_name AS `业务类型`,
    i.income_bill_count AS `应收账单数`,
    e.expend_bill_count AS `应支账单数`,
    i.should_income AS `应收金额`,
    i.real_income AS `实收金额`,
    i.income_debt AS `未收金额`,
    e.should_expend AS `应支金额`,
    e.real_expend AS `实支金额`,
    e.expend_arrear AS `未支金额`,
    ROUND(i.should_income - e.should_expend, 2) AS `应收应支利润`,
    ROUND(i.real_income - e.real_expend, 2) AS `实收实支利润`,
    CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(i.should_income, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND((i.should_income - e.should_expend) / i.should_income * 100, 2)
    END AS `应收利润率(%)`,
    CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(i.real_income, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND((i.real_income - e.real_expend) / i.real_income * 100, 2)
    END AS `实收利润率(%)`,
    CASE
        WHEN i.real_income - e.real_expend = MAX(i.real_income - e.real_expend) OVER () THEN '更赚钱'
        ELSE '次之'
    END AS `对比结果`
FROM income i
JOIN expend e
  ON i.business_type = e.business_type
ORDER BY `实收实支利润` DESC;

WITH overdue_paid AS (

        '集中' AS business_type_name,

        fi.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
        t.name AS tenant_name,
        t.phone AS tenant_phone,
        fi.id AS income_id,
        fi.collection_date AS due_date,
        fi.repay_pay_date AS pay_date,
        DATEDIFF(DATE(fi.repay_pay_date), DATE(fi.collection_date)) AS overdue_days,
        fi.real_money AS paid_money,
        fi.final_money AS bill_money
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fi
    LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants t
        ON fi.tenants_id = t.id
       AND t.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(t.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE fi.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete,0) = 0

      AND fi.collection_date IS NOT NULL
      AND DATE(fi.repay_pay_date) > DATE(fi.collection_date)

    SELECT

        wt.tenants_name AS tenant_name,

        ji.id AS income_id,
        ji.collection_date AS due_date,
        ji.real_pay_date AS pay_date,
        DATEDIFF(DATE(ji.real_pay_date), DATE(ji.collection_date)) AS overdue_days,
        ji.real_money AS paid_money,
        ji.final_money AS bill_money
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income ji
    LEFT JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt
        ON ji.tenants_id = wt.id
       AND wt.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE ji.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ji.is_delete,0) = 0
      AND ji.business_type = 2
      AND ji.real_money > 0
      AND ji.real_pay_date IS NOT NULL
      AND ji.collection_date IS NOT NULL
      AND DATE(ji.real_pay_date) > DATE(ji.collection_date)

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_type_name,
        3 AS business_type,
        ji.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
        jt.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
        jt.phone AS tenant_phone,
        ji.id AS income_id,
        ji.collection_date AS due_date,
        ji.real_pay_date AS pay_date,
        DATEDIFF(DATE(ji.real_pay_date), DATE(ji.collection_date)) AS overdue_days,
        ji.real_money AS paid_money,
        ji.final_money AS bill_money
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income ji
    LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
        ON ji.tenants_id = jt.id
       AND jt.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE ji.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ji.is_delete,0) = 0
      AND ji.business_type = 3
      AND ji.real_money > 0
      AND ji.real_pay_date IS NOT NULL
      AND ji.collection_date IS NOT NULL
      AND DATE(ji.real_pay_date) > DATE(ji.collection_date)
)
SELECT

    COUNT(*) AS overdue_paid_bill_count,

ORDER BY max_overdue_days DESC, last_overdue_pay_date DESC;
