WITH whole_room_base AS (
    SELECT
        h.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
    FROM qft_whole_room r
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing h
        ON h.id = r.housing_id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY h.store_id
),
joint_room_base AS (
    SELECT
        h.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
    FROM qft_joint_room r
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing h
        ON h.id = r.housing_id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY h.store_id
),
focus_room_base AS (
    SELECT
        h.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
    FROM qft_focus_room r
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON h.id = r.housing_id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY h.store_id
),
room_stats AS (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(leased_rooms) AS leased_rooms
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id, total_rooms, leased_rooms FROM whole_room_base
        UNION ALL
        SELECT store_id, total_rooms, leased_rooms FROM joint_room_base
        UNION ALL
        SELECT store_id, total_rooms, leased_rooms FROM focus_room_base
    ) t
    GROUP BY store_id
),
target_stores AS (
    SELECT
        s.id AS store_id,
        s.name AS store_name,
        COALESCE(rs.total_rooms, 0) AS total_rooms,
        COALESCE(rs.leased_rooms, 0) AS leased_rooms
    FROM qft_store s
    INNER JOIN room_stats rs
        ON rs.store_id = s.id
    WHERE s.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
    ORDER BY rs.total_rooms DESC, s.id
    LIMIT 3
),
income_stats AS (
    SELECT
        f.store_id,
        SUM(IFNULL(f.money, 0)) AS income_money_30d
    FROM qft_finance f
    INNER JOIN target_stores ts
        ON ts.store_id = f.store_id
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(f.nature, 0) = 1
      AND IFNULL(f.cashier, 0) = 1
      AND f.account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      AND f.account_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    GROUP BY f.store_id
),
arrears_stats AS (
    SELECT
        b.store_id,
        SUM(IFNULL(b.total_trade_money, 0)) AS receivable_money_due,
        SUM(IFNULL(b.total_debt_money, 0)) AS debt_money_due
    FROM qft_bill b
    INNER JOIN target_stores ts
        ON ts.store_id = b.store_id
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(b.is_invalid, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(b.trade_type, 0) = 1
      AND b.trade_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    GROUP BY b.store_id
),
repair_stats AS (
    SELECT
        r.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS total_repairs_30d,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN IFNULL(r.receive, 1) = 2
                 AND r.receive_time IS NOT NULL
                 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, r.create_time, r.receive_time) <= 24
                THEN 1 ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS response_in_24h_30d,
        AVG(
            CASE
                WHEN IFNULL(r.receive, 1) = 2
                 AND r.receive_time IS NOT NULL
                THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, r.create_time, r.receive_time)
                ELSE NULL
            END
        ) AS avg_response_hours
    FROM qft_room_repair r
    INNER JOIN target_stores ts
        ON ts.store_id = r.store_id
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND r.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      AND r.create_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    GROUP BY r.store_id
),
final_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        ts.store_id,
        ts.store_name,
        ts.total_rooms,
        ts.leased_rooms,
        CASE
            WHEN ts.total_rooms = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ts.leased_rooms / ts.total_rooms
        END AS occupancy_rate,
        COALESCE(i.income_money_30d, 0) AS income_money_30d,
        COALESCE(a.receivable_money_due, 0) AS receivable_money_due,
        COALESCE(a.debt_money_due, 0) AS debt_money_due,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(a.receivable_money_due, 0) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE COALESCE(a.debt_money_due, 0) / a.receivable_money_due
        END AS arrears_rate,
        COALESCE(r.total_repairs_30d, 0) AS total_repairs_30d,
        COALESCE(r.response_in_24h_30d, 0) AS response_in_24h_30d,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(r.total_repairs_30d, 0) = 0 THEN 1
            ELSE COALESCE(r.response_in_24h_30d, 0) / r.total_repairs_30d
        END AS repair_response_rate_24h,
        COALESCE(r.avg_response_hours, 0) AS avg_response_hours
    FROM target_stores ts
    LEFT JOIN income_stats i
        ON i.store_id = ts.store_id
    LEFT JOIN arrears_stats a
        ON a.store_id = ts.store_id
    LEFT JOIN repair_stats r
        ON r.store_id = ts.store_id
),
metric_bounds AS (
    SELECT
        MIN(income_money_30d) AS min_income_money_30d,
        MAX(income_money_30d) AS max_income_money_30d
    FROM final_metrics
)
SELECT
    fm.store_id,
    fm.store_name,
    fm.total_rooms,
    fm.leased_rooms,
    ROUND(fm.occupancy_rate * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate,
    ROUND(fm.income_money_30d, 2) AS income_money_30d,
    ROUND(fm.receivable_money_due, 2) AS receivable_money_due,
    ROUND(fm.debt_money_due, 2) AS debt_money_due,
    ROUND(fm.arrears_rate * 100, 2) AS arrears_rate,
    fm.total_repairs_30d,
    fm.response_in_24h_30d,
    ROUND(fm.repair_response_rate_24h * 100, 2) AS repair_response_rate_24h,
    ROUND(fm.avg_response_hours, 2) AS avg_response_hours,
    ROUND(fm.occupancy_rate * 100, 2) AS occupancy_score,
    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN mb.max_income_money_30d = mb.min_income_money_30d THEN 100
            ELSE (fm.income_money_30d - mb.min_income_money_30d) / NULLIF(mb.max_income_money_30d - mb.min_income_money_30d, 0) * 100
        END,
        2
    ) AS income_score,
    ROUND((1 - fm.arrears_rate) * 100, 2) AS arrears_score,
    ROUND(fm.repair_response_rate_24h * 100, 2) AS repair_response_score,
    ROUND(
        (fm.occupancy_rate * 100) * 0.35
        + (
            CASE
                WHEN mb.max_income_money_30d = mb.min_income_money_30d THEN 100
                ELSE (fm.income_money_30d - mb.min_income_money_30d) / NULLIF(mb.max_income_money_30d - mb.min_income_money_30d, 0) * 100
            END
        ) * 0.30
        + ((1 - fm.arrears_rate) * 100) * 0.20
        + (fm.repair_response_rate_24h * 100) * 0.15,
        2
    ) AS health_score
FROM final_metrics fm
CROSS JOIN metric_bounds mb
ORDER BY health_score DESC, fm.store_id;

                WHEN IFNULL(i.final_money,0) > 0

                ELSE 0

joint_income AS (

                WHEN IFNULL(i.final_money,0) > 0
                    THEN LEAST(IFNULL(i.real_money,0), IFNULL(i.final_money,0)) * IFNULL(i.house_money,0) / i.final_money
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS rent_received_est
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing h

        UNION ALL

        FROM qft_whole_housing
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
        UNION ALL
        SELECT property_adrr AS property_id, IFNULL(room_count,0) AS room_count
        FROM qft_joint_housing
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0

    GROUP BY property_id

SELECT
    ap.id AS property_id,
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区,
    a.area_name AS 区域,
    IFNULL(hs.housing_count,0) AS 房源套数,
    IFNULL(hs.room_count,0) AS 房间数,
    ROUND(IFNULL(r.renovation_cost,0),2) AS 装修总投入,
    ROUND(IFNULL(i.rent_receivable,0),2) AS 累计应收租金,
    ROUND(IFNULL(i.rent_received_est,0),2) AS 累计已收租金,
    ROUND(IFNULL(i.rent_received_est,0) - IFNULL(r.renovation_cost,0),2) AS 租金减装修投入,
    ROUND(
        CASE
            WHEN IFNULL(r.renovation_cost,0) > 0
                THEN IFNULL(i.rent_received_est,0) / r.renovation_cost * 100
            ELSE NULL
        END,
        2
    ) AS 装修回收率_pct
FROM property_base pb
INNER JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON pb.property_id = ap.id
   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area a
    ON ap.area_id = a.id
   AND a.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(a.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN renovation r
    ON pb.property_id = r.property_id
LEFT JOIN income i
    ON pb.property_id = i.property_id
LEFT JOIN house_stats hs
    ON pb.property_id = hs.property_id
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN IFNULL(r.renovation_cost,0) > 0 THEN IFNULL(i.rent_received_est,0) / r.renovation_cost
        ELSE -1
    END DESC,
    IFNULL(i.rent_received_est,0) DESC,
    IFNULL(r.renovation_cost,0) DESC;

WITH params AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) AS start_date,
        DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS end_date
),
tenant_base AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS business_type,
        ft.id AS tenant_id,
        fr.store_id,
        ft.business_block,
        COALESCE(ft.register_time, ft.create_time) AS tenant_create_time
    FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_room fr
        ON fr.id = ft.room_id
       AND fr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        2 AS business_type,
        wt.id AS tenant_id,
        wh.store_id,
        wt.business_block,
        COALESCE(wt.register_time, wt.create_time) AS tenant_create_time
    FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_room wr
        ON wr.id = wt.room_id
       AND wr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
        ON wh.id = wr.housing_id
       AND wh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS business_type,
        jt.id AS tenant_id,
        jr.store_id,
        jt.business_block,
        COALESCE(jt.register_time, jt.create_time) AS tenant_create_time
    FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_room jr
        ON jr.id = jt.room_id
       AND jr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
),
new_sign_store AS (
    SELECT
        tb.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(tb.business_type, '#', tb.tenant_id)) AS recent_new_sign_tenants
    FROM tenant_base tb
    INNER JOIN params p ON 1 = 1
    WHERE tb.tenant_create_time >= p.start_date
      AND tb.tenant_create_time < p.end_date
      AND IFNULL(tb.business_block, 1) = 1
    GROUP BY tb.store_id
),
recent_income_base AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS business_type,
        fti.store_id,
        fti.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
        fti.final_money
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fti
    INNER JOIN params p ON 1 = 1
    WHERE fti.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fti.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fti.is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fti.is_deposit, 0) = 0
      AND fti.tenants_id IS NOT NULL
      AND fti.tenants_id > 0
      AND fti.collection_date >= p.start_date
      AND fti.collection_date < p.end_date

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        jti.business_type,
        jti.store_id,
        jti.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
        jti.final_money
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
    INNER JOIN params p ON 1 = 1
    WHERE jti.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(jti.is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(jti.is_deposit, 0) = 0
      AND jti.business_type IN (2, 3)
      AND jti.tenants_id IS NOT NULL
      AND jti.tenants_id > 0
      AND jti.collection_date >= p.start_date
      AND jti.collection_date < p.end_date
),
bill_store AS (
    SELECT
        rib.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(rib.business_type, '#', rib.tenant_id)) AS recent_bill_tenants,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN tb.tenant_create_time < p.start_date THEN CONCAT(rib.business_type, '#', rib.tenant_id)
        END) AS old_tenant_bill_tenants,
        SUM(rib.final_money) AS recent_total_bill_money,
        SUM(CASE
            WHEN tb.tenant_create_time < p.start_date THEN rib.final_money
            ELSE 0
        END) AS recent_old_tenant_bill_money
    FROM recent_income_base rib
    INNER JOIN params p ON 1 = 1
    LEFT JOIN tenant_base tb
        ON tb.business_type = rib.business_type
       AND tb.tenant_id = rib.tenant_id
    GROUP BY rib.store_id
),
store_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        s.id AS store_id,
        s.name AS store_name,
        COALESCE(ns.recent_new_sign_tenants, 0) AS recent_new_sign_tenants,
        COALESCE(bs.recent_bill_tenants, 0) AS recent_bill_tenants,
        COALESCE(bs.old_tenant_bill_tenants, 0) AS old_tenant_bill_tenants,
        COALESCE(bs.recent_total_bill_money, 0) AS recent_total_bill_money,
        COALESCE(bs.recent_old_tenant_bill_money, 0) AS recent_old_tenant_bill_money,
        ROUND(
            COALESCE(bs.recent_old_tenant_bill_money, 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(bs.recent_total_bill_money, 0), 0),
            4
        ) AS old_tenant_bill_ratio
    FROM qft_store s
    LEFT JOIN new_sign_store ns
        ON ns.store_id = s.id
    LEFT JOIN bill_store bs
        ON bs.store_id = s.id
    WHERE s.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
),
avg_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(recent_new_sign_tenants) AS avg_recent_new_sign_tenants,
        AVG(CASE WHEN recent_total_bill_money > 0 THEN old_tenant_bill_ratio END) AS avg_old_tenant_bill_ratio
    FROM store_metrics
    WHERE recent_total_bill_money > 0
)
SELECT
    sm.store_id,
    sm.store_name,
    sm.recent_new_sign_tenants,
    sm.recent_bill_tenants,
    sm.old_tenant_bill_tenants,
    sm.recent_total_bill_money,
    sm.recent_old_tenant_bill_money,
    sm.old_tenant_bill_ratio
FROM store_metrics sm
CROSS JOIN avg_metrics am
WHERE sm.recent_total_bill_money > 0
  AND sm.recent_new_sign_tenants < COALESCE(am.avg_recent_new_sign_tenants, 0)
  AND sm.old_tenant_bill_ratio > COALESCE(am.avg_old_tenant_bill_ratio, 0)
ORDER BY sm.old_tenant_bill_ratio DESC,
         sm.recent_new_sign_tenants ASC,
         sm.recent_old_tenant_bill_money DESC;

results.question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH room_stats AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS business_type,
        '集中整租' AS business_name,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms,
        COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vacant_rooms
    FROM qft_focus_room r
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON h.id = r.housing_id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(r.is_main, 0) <> 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        2 AS business_type,
        '整租' AS business_name,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms,
        COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vacant_rooms
    FROM qft_whole_room r
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing h
        ON h.id = r.housing_id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(h.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(r.transfer_status, 0) <> 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS business_type,
        '合租' AS business_name,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms,
        COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vacant_rooms
    FROM qft_joint_room r
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing h
        ON h.id = r.housing_id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(h.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(r.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
),
bill_stats AS (
    SELECT
        b.sale_type AS business_type,
        SUM(b.total_trade_money) AS due_amount,
        SUM(b.total_real_money) AS received_amount,
        SUM(b.total_debt_money) AS debt_amount
    FROM qft_bill b
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(b.is_invalid, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(b.is_transfer, 0) = 0
      AND b.trade_type = 1
      AND b.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
      AND b.trade_date <= NOW()
    GROUP BY b.sale_type
),
merged AS (
    SELECT
        rs.business_type,
        rs.business_name,
        rs.total_rooms,
        rs.rented_rooms,
        rs.vacant_rooms,
        COALESCE(bs.due_amount, 0) AS due_amount,
        COALESCE(bs.received_amount, 0) AS received_amount,
        COALESCE(bs.debt_amount, 0) AS debt_amount
    FROM room_stats rs
    LEFT JOIN bill_stats bs
        ON rs.business_type = bs.business_type
),
final_data AS (
    SELECT
        business_type,
        business_name,
        total_rooms,
        rented_rooms,
        vacant_rooms,
        due_amount,
        received_amount,
        debt_amount
    FROM merged

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        0 AS business_type,
        '整体' AS business_name,
        SUM(total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(rented_rooms) AS rented_rooms,
        SUM(vacant_rooms) AS vacant_rooms,
        SUM(due_amount) AS due_amount,
        SUM(received_amount) AS received_amount,
        SUM(debt_amount) AS debt_amount
    FROM merged
),
scored AS (
    SELECT
        business_type,
        business_name,
        total_rooms,
        rented_rooms,
        vacant_rooms,
        due_amount,
        received_amount,
        debt_amount,
        COALESCE(rented_rooms / NULLIF(total_rooms, 0), 0) AS occupancy_rate,
        COALESCE(vacant_rooms / NULLIF(total_rooms, 0), 0) AS vacancy_rate,
        COALESCE(received_amount / NULLIF(due_amount, 0), 0) AS collection_rate
    FROM final_data
)
SELECT
    business_name AS 维度,
    total_rooms AS 在管房间数,
    rented_rooms AS 已租房间数,
    vacant_rooms AS 空置房间数,
    CONCAT(ROUND(occupancy_rate * 100, 2), '%') AS 出租率,
    CONCAT(ROUND(vacancy_rate * 100, 2), '%') AS 空置率,
    ROUND(due_amount, 2) AS 到期应收金额,
    ROUND(received_amount, 2) AS 已回款金额,
    ROUND(debt_amount, 2) AS 未回款金额,
    CONCAT(ROUND(collection_rate * 100, 2), '%') AS 回款率,
    ROUND((occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (1 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2) * 100, 2) AS 健康评分,
    CASE
        WHEN (occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (1 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2) * 100 >= 90 THEN '优秀'
        WHEN (occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (1 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2) * 100 >= 80 THEN '良好'
        WHEN (occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (1 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2) * 100 >= 70 THEN '一般'
        ELSE '需关注'
    END AS 综合评估
FROM scored
ORDER BY CASE WHEN business_type = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, business_type;

results.question: 城东门店合租的欠费租客有谁？欠的是哪间房？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  s.name AS 门店名称,
  t.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
  t.phone AS 联系电话,
  h.house_code AS 房源编号,
  CONCAT_WS(' ', ap.property_adrr, h.building, h.unit_name, h.door_number, r.room_number) AS 欠费房间,
  SUM(i.debt_money) AS 欠费金额
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i
INNER JOIN qft_store s
  ON s.id = i.store_id
  AND s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_joint_tenants t
  ON t.id = i.tenants_id
  AND t.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing h
  ON h.id = i.housing_id
  AND h.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_joint_room r
  ON r.id = i.room_id
  AND r.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
  ON ap.id = h.property_adrr
  AND ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND i.business_type = 3
  AND IFNULL(i.is_history, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(i.debt_money, 0) > 0
  AND s.name = '城东门店'
GROUP BY
  s.name,
  t.id,
  t.tenants_name,
  t.phone,
  h.house_code,
  ap.property_adrr,
  h.building,
  h.unit_name,
  h.door_number,
  r.room_number
ORDER BY SUM(i.debt_money) DESC, t.tenants_name ASC;

results.question: 帮我统计一下，整租房源的托管期限都是多久？快到期的有哪些？
results.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        h.id AS housing_id,
        h.house_code,
        s.name AS store_name,
        ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
        h.building,
        h.unit_name,
        h.door_number,
        h.housing_name AS landlord_name,
        h.hosting_create_time,
        h.hosting_end_time,
        CONCAT(
            IFNULL(h.contract_year, 0), '年',
            IFNULL(h.contract_month, 0), '月',
            IFNULL(h.contract_day, 0), '天'
        ) AS contract_term,
        DATEDIFF(h.hosting_end_time, h.hosting_create_time) AS contract_days,
        DATEDIFF(h.hosting_end_time, CURDATE()) AS remaining_days
    FROM qft_whole_housing h
    LEFT JOIN qft_store s
        ON h.store_id = s.id
       AND s.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON h.property_adrr = ap.id
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
),
report AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS sort_no,
        '全部托管明细' AS result_type,
        housing_id,
        house_code,
        store_name,
        property_address,
        building,
        unit_name,
        door_number,
        landlord_name,
        hosting_create_time,
        hosting_end_time,
        contract_term,
        contract_days,
        remaining_days,
        CASE
            WHEN hosting_end_time < CURDATE() THEN '已到期'
            WHEN remaining_days <= 30 THEN '30天内到期'
            WHEN remaining_days <= 60 THEN '60天内到期'
            WHEN remaining_days <= 90 THEN '90天内到期'
            ELSE '正常'
        END AS expire_status,
        NULL AS housing_count
    FROM base

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        2 AS sort_no,
        '托管期限分布' AS result_type,
        NULL AS housing_id,
        NULL AS house_code,
        NULL AS store_name,
        NULL AS property_address,
        NULL AS building,
        NULL AS unit_name,
        NULL AS door_number,
        NULL AS landlord_name,
        NULL AS hosting_create_time,
        NULL AS hosting_end_time,
        contract_term,
        NULL AS contract_days,
        NULL AS remaining_days,
        NULL AS expire_status,
        COUNT(*) AS housing_count
    FROM base
    GROUP BY contract_term

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS sort_no,
        '30天内到期房源' AS result_type,
        housing_id,
        house_code,
        store_name,
        property_address,
        building,
        unit_name,
        door_number,
        landlord_name,
        hosting_create_time,
        hosting_end_time,
        contract_term,
        contract_days,
        remaining_days,
        CASE
            WHEN hosting_end_time < CURDATE() THEN '已到期'
            WHEN remaining_days <= 30 THEN '30天内到期'
            WHEN remaining_days <= 60 THEN '60天内到期'
            WHEN remaining_days <= 90 THEN '90天内到期'
            ELSE '正常'
        END AS expire_status,
        NULL AS housing_count
    FROM base
    WHERE hosting_end_time >= CURDATE()
      AND remaining_days <= 30
)
SELECT
    result_type,
    housing_id,
    house_code,
    store_name,
    property_address,
    building,
    unit_name,
    door_number,
    landlord_name,
    hosting_create_time,
    hosting_end_time,
    contract_term,
    contract_days,
    remaining_days,
    expire_status,
    housing_count
FROM report
ORDER BY
    sort_no ASC,
    CASE WHEN sort_no = 2 THEN housing_count END DESC,
    CASE WHEN sort_no IN (1, 3) THEN hosting_end_time END ASC,
    CASE WHEN sort_no = 3 THEN remaining_days END ASC;

results.question: 集中式和合租哪个更划算？从投入和收益两方面分析。
results.generated_sql:
WITH business_base AS (
    SELECT 1 AS sale_type, '集中式' AS business_model
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 3 AS sale_type, '合租' AS business_model
),
housing_room AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS sale_type,
        COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS housing_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS room_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN r.id END) AS leased_room_count
    FROM qft_focus_housing h
    LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room r
        ON r.housing_id = h.id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS sale_type,
        COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS housing_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS room_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN r.id END) AS leased_room_count
    FROM qft_joint_housing h
    LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room r
        ON r.housing_id = h.id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(r.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(h.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
),
tenant_summary AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS sale_type,
        COUNT(*) AS tenant_count
    FROM qft_focus_tenants
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS sale_type,
        COUNT(*) AS tenant_count
    FROM qft_joint_tenants
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(transfer_status, 0) <> 1
),
income_summary AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS sale_type,
        SUM(IFNULL(final_money, 0)) AS income_due_total,
        SUM(IFNULL(real_money, 0)) AS income_real_total,
        SUM(IFNULL(debt_money, 0)) AS income_debt_total
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS sale_type,
        SUM(IFNULL(final_money, 0)) AS income_due_total,
        SUM(IFNULL(real_money, 0)) AS income_real_total,
        SUM(IFNULL(debt_money, 0)) AS income_debt_total
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND business_type = 3
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(transfer_status, 0) <> 1
),
expend_summary AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS sale_type,
        SUM(IFNULL(final_money, 0)) AS expend_due_total,
        SUM(IFNULL(real_money, 0)) AS expend_real_total,
        SUM(IFNULL(arrear_money, 0)) AS expend_debt_total
    FROM qft_focus_bill_expend
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS sale_type,
        SUM(IFNULL(final_money, 0)) AS expend_due_total,
        SUM(IFNULL(real_money, 0)) AS expend_real_total,
        SUM(IFNULL(arrear_money, 0)) AS expend_debt_total
    FROM qft_joint_bill_expend
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(transfer_status, 0) <> 1
),
renovation_summary AS (
    SELECT
        business_type AS sale_type,
        SUM(IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0)) AS renovation_total
    FROM qft_rm_renovation_record
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND business_type IN (1, 3)
    GROUP BY business_type
),
base_data AS (
    SELECT
        b.sale_type,
        b.business_model,
        IFNULL(hr.housing_count, 0) AS housing_count,
        IFNULL(hr.room_count, 0) AS room_count,
        IFNULL(hr.leased_room_count, 0) AS leased_room_count,
        ROUND(
            IFNULL(hr.leased_room_count, 0) / NULLIF(IFNULL(hr.room_count, 0), 0) * 100,
            2
        ) AS occupancy_rate_pct,
        IFNULL(ts.tenant_count, 0) AS tenant_count,
        IFNULL(i.income_due_total, 0) AS income_due_total,
        IFNULL(i.income_real_total, 0) AS income_real_total,
        IFNULL(i.income_debt_total, 0) AS income_debt_total,
        IFNULL(e.expend_due_total, 0) AS expend_due_total,
        IFNULL(e.expend_real_total, 0) AS expend_real_total,
        IFNULL(e.expend_debt_total, 0) AS expend_debt_total,
        IFNULL(r.renovation_total, 0) AS renovation_total,
        IFNULL(e.expend_due_total, 0) + IFNULL(r.renovation_total, 0) AS input_due_total,
        IFNULL(e.expend_real_total, 0) + IFNULL(r.renovation_total, 0) AS input_real_total,
        IFNULL(i.income_due_total, 0) - IFNULL(e.expend_due_total, 0) - IFNULL(r.renovation_total, 0) AS due_profit,
        IFNULL(i.income_real_total, 0) - IFNULL(e.expend_real_total, 0) - IFNULL(r.renovation_total, 0) AS real_profit,
        ROUND(
            (IFNULL(i.income_real_total, 0) - IFNULL(e.expend_real_total, 0) - IFNULL(r.renovation_total, 0))
            / NULLIF(IFNULL(e.expend_real_total, 0) + IFNULL(r.renovation_total, 0), 0) * 100,
            2
        ) AS real_roi_pct,
        ROUND(
            IFNULL(i.income_real_total, 0) / NULLIF(IFNULL(hr.room_count, 0), 0),
            2
        ) AS income_real_per_room,
        ROUND(
            (IFNULL(e.expend_real_total, 0) + IFNULL(r.renovation_total, 0)) / NULLIF(IFNULL(hr.room_count, 0), 0),
            2
        ) AS input_real_per_room,
        ROUND(
            (IFNULL(i.income_real_total, 0) - IFNULL(e.expend_real_total, 0) - IFNULL(r.renovation_total, 0))
            / NULLIF(IFNULL(hr.room_count, 0), 0),
            2
        ) AS profit_per_room,
        ROUND(
            (IFNULL(i.income_real_total, 0) - IFNULL(e.expend_real_total, 0) - IFNULL(r.renovation_total, 0))
            / NULLIF(IFNULL(i.income_real_total, 0), 0) * 100,
            2
        ) AS profit_margin_pct
    FROM business_base b
    LEFT JOIN housing_room hr
        ON hr.sale_type = b.sale_type
    LEFT JOIN tenant_summary ts
        ON ts.sale_type = b.sale_type
    LEFT JOIN income_summary i
        ON i.sale_type = b.sale_type
    LEFT JOIN expend_summary e
        ON e.sale_type = b.sale_type
    LEFT JOIN renovation_summary r
        ON r.sale_type = b.sale_type
),
best_model AS (
    SELECT sale_type AS best_sale_type
    FROM base_data
    ORDER BY real_roi_pct DESC, real_profit DESC, occupancy_rate_pct DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    bd.business_model,
    bd.housing_count,
    bd.room_count,
    bd.leased_room_count,
    bd.occupancy_rate_pct,
    bd.tenant_count,
    bd.input_due_total,
    bd.input_real_total,
    bd.expend_due_total,
    bd.expend_real_total,
    bd.renovation_total,
    bd.income_due_total,
    bd.income_real_total,
    bd.income_debt_total,
    bd.expend_debt_total,
    bd.due_profit,
    bd.real_profit,
    bd.real_roi_pct,
    bd.profit_margin_pct,
    bd.income_real_per_room,
    bd.input_real_per_room,
    bd.profit_per_room,
    CASE
        WHEN bd.sale_type = bm.best_sale_type THEN '更划算'
        ELSE '相对次优'
    END AS cost_effectiveness
FROM base_data bd
CROSS JOIN best_model bm

results.generated_sql:
WITH lock_map AS (
    SELECT
        sh.company_id,
        sh.sale_type AS business_type,
        d.device_no AS lock_id,
        MAX(sh.house_id) AS house_id,
        MAX(sh.room_id) AS room_id
    FROM qft_smart_device d
    JOIN qft_house_device hd
      ON hd.device_id = d.id
     AND hd.device_type = 1
     AND hd.is_delete = 0
     AND hd.company_id = 1001
    JOIN qft_smart_house sh
      ON sh.id = hd.smart_house_id
     AND sh.company_id = hd.company_id
     AND sh.is_delete = 0
    WHERE d.device_type = 1
      AND d.is_delete = 0
    GROUP BY sh.company_id, sh.sale_type, d.device_no
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        r.id,
        r.business_type,
        lm.house_id,
        lm.room_id,
        r.lock_id,
        r.lock_type,
        r.open_door_time,
        r.type AS open_type,
        r.pwd_id,
        r.open_name,
        r.open_phone
    FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r
    LEFT JOIN lock_map lm
      ON lm.company_id = r.company_id
     AND lm.business_type = r.business_type
     AND lm.lock_id = r.lock_id
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND r.open_door_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY
),
hour_stats AS (
    SELECT
        DATE(open_door_time) AS open_date,
        HOUR(open_door_time) AS open_hour,
        COUNT(*) AS open_count
    FROM base
    GROUP BY DATE(open_door_time), HOUR(open_door_time)
),
early_records AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        business_type,
        house_id,
        room_id,
        lock_id,
        lock_type,
        open_door_time,
        open_type,
        pwd_id,
        open_name,
        open_phone
    FROM base
    WHERE TIME(open_door_time) >= '00:00:00'
      AND TIME(open_door_time) < '06:00:00'
),
repeat_early AS (
    SELECT
        lock_id,
        business_type,
        house_id,
        room_id,
        DATE(open_door_time) AS open_date,
        COUNT(*) AS early_morning_open_count,
        MIN(open_door_time) AS first_open_time,
        MAX(open_door_time) AS last_open_time,
        GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT open_name ORDER BY open_name SEPARATOR ',') AS open_names
    FROM base
    WHERE TIME(open_door_time) >= '00:00:00'
      AND TIME(open_door_time) < '06:00:00'
    GROUP BY lock_id, business_type, house_id, room_id, DATE(open_door_time)
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
),
summary AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS recent_open_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN TIME(open_door_time) >= '00:00:00' AND TIME(open_door_time) < '06:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS early_morning_open_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TIME(open_door_time) >= '00:00:00' AND TIME(open_door_time) < '06:00:00' THEN lock_id END) AS early_morning_lock_count,
        MIN(open_door_time) AS first_record_time,
        MAX(open_door_time) AS last_record_time
    FROM base
)
SELECT
    s.recent_open_count,
    s.early_morning_open_count,
    s.early_morning_lock_count,
    s.first_record_time,
    s.last_record_time,
    COALESCE(
        (
            SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                JSON_OBJECT(
                    'open_date', t.open_date,
                    'open_hour', t.open_hour,
                    'open_count', t.open_count
                )
            )
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    open_date,
                    open_hour,
                    open_count
                FROM hour_stats
                ORDER BY open_date DESC, open_hour ASC
                LIMIT 200
            ) t
        ),
        JSON_ARRAY()
    ) AS hourly_distribution,
    COALESCE(
        (
            SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                JSON_OBJECT(
                    'id', t.id,
                    'business_type', t.business_type,
                    'house_id', t.house_id,
                    'room_id', t.room_id,
                    'lock_id', t.lock_id,
                    'lock_type', t.lock_type,
                    'open_door_time', t.open_door_time,
                    'open_type', t.open_type,
                    'pwd_id', t.pwd_id,
                    'open_name', t.open_name,
                    'open_phone', t.open_phone
                )
            )
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    id,
                    business_type,
                    house_id,
                    room_id,
                    lock_id,
                    lock_type,
                    open_door_time,
                    open_type,
                    pwd_id,
                    open_name,
                    open_phone
                FROM early_records
                ORDER BY open_door_time DESC
                LIMIT 200
            ) t
        ),
        JSON_ARRAY()
    ) AS early_morning_records,
    COALESCE(
        (
            SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(
                JSON_OBJECT(
                    'lock_id', t.lock_id,
                    'business_type', t.business_type,
                    'house_id', t.house_id,
                    'room_id', t.room_id,
                    'open_date', t.open_date,
                    'early_morning_open_count', t.early_morning_open_count,
                    'first_open_time', t.first_open_time,
                    'last_open_time', t.last_open_time,
                    'open_names', t.open_names
                )
            )
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    lock_id,
                    business_type,
                    house_id,
                    room_id,
                    open_date,
                    early_morning_open_count,
                    first_open_time,
                    last_open_time,
                    open_names
                FROM repeat_early
                ORDER BY open_date DESC, early_morning_open_count DESC, last_open_time DESC
                LIMIT 200
            ) t
        ),
        JSON_ARRAY()
    ) AS repeated_early_morning_opens
FROM summary s;

FROM task_count tc

FROM

      COUNT(*) AS room_count
    FROM qft_joint_room jr

      ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
     AND jh.company_id = 1001
     AND jh.is_delete = 0
     AND jh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND jr.is_delete = 0
      AND jr.pricing_money IS NOT NULL
      AND jr.pricing_money > 0
  ) AS avg_info
LEFT JOIN
  (
    SELECT
      jr.id AS room_id,
      jr.housing_id,
      jh.house_code,
      ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
      jh.building,
      jh.unit_name,
      jh.door_number,
      jr.room_number,
      jr.pricing_money
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
      ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
     AND jh.company_id = 1001
     AND jh.is_delete = 0
     AND jh.is_check_out = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
      ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
     AND ap.company_id = 1001
     AND ap.is_delete = 0
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND jr.is_delete = 0
      AND jr.pricing_money IS NOT NULL
      AND jr.pricing_money > 0
    ORDER BY jr.pricing_money DESC, jr.id ASC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS max_info
  ON 1 = 1
LEFT JOIN
  (
    SELECT
      jr.id AS room_id,
      jr.housing_id,
      jh.house_code,
      ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
      jh.building,
      jh.unit_name,
      jh.door_number,
      jr.room_number,
      jr.pricing_money
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
      ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
     AND jh.company_id = 1001
     AND jh.is_delete = 0
     AND jh.is_check_out = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
      ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
     AND ap.company_id = 1001
     AND ap.is_delete = 0
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND jr.is_delete = 0
      AND jr.pricing_money IS NOT NULL
      AND jr.pricing_money > 0
    ORDER BY jr.pricing_money ASC, jr.id ASC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS min_info

results.question: 帮我做个经营简报：房源总量、租客总量、出租率、本期收入、欠费总额。
results.generated_sql:
WITH total_rooms AS (
    SELECT COUNT(1) AS cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT wr.id
        FROM qft_whole_room wr
        INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
            ON wh.id = wr.housing_id
           AND wh.company_id = 1001
           AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
           AND IFNULL(wh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
        WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(wr.transfer_status, 0) <> 1

        UNION ALL

        SELECT jr.id
        FROM qft_joint_room jr
        INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
            ON jh.id = jr.housing_id
           AND jh.company_id = 1001
           AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
           AND IFNULL(jh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
        WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(jr.transfer_status, 0) <> 1

        UNION ALL

        SELECT fr.id
        FROM qft_focus_room fr
        INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
            ON fh.id = fr.housing_id
           AND fh.company_id = 1001
           AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
           AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
        WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) t
),
occupied_rooms AS (
    SELECT COUNT(1) AS cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT wt.room_id
        FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
        WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(wt.transfer_status, 0) <> 1

        UNION

        SELECT DISTINCT jt.room_id
        FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
        WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(jt.transfer_status, 0) <> 1

        UNION

        SELECT DISTINCT ft.room_id
        FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
        WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) t
),
tenant_total AS (
    SELECT
        (
            SELECT COUNT(1)
            FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
            WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
              AND IFNULL(wt.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
        ) +
        (
            SELECT COUNT(1)
            FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
            WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
              AND IFNULL(jt.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
        ) +
        (
            SELECT COUNT(1)
            FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
            WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
        ) AS cnt
),
current_income AS (
    SELECT IFNULL(SUM(f.money), 0) AS cnt
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND f.cashier = 1
      AND f.account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
      AND f.account_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
),
arrears_total AS (
    SELECT
        IFNULL((
            SELECT SUM(x.debt_money)
            FROM qft_focus_tenants_income x
            WHERE x.company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(x.is_delete, 0) = 0
              AND IFNULL(x.is_history, 0) = 0
              AND IFNULL(x.debt_money, 0) > 0
        ), 0)
        +
        IFNULL((
            SELECT SUM(y.debt_money)
            FROM qft_joint_tenants_income y
            WHERE y.company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(y.is_delete, 0) = 0
              AND IFNULL(y.is_history, 0) = 0
              AND IFNULL(y.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
              AND IFNULL(y.debt_money, 0) > 0
        ), 0) AS cnt
)
SELECT
    tr.cnt AS `房源总量`,
    tt.cnt AS `租客总量`,
    CONCAT(ROUND(IFNULL(oroom.cnt / NULLIF(tr.cnt, 0) * 100, 0), 2), '%') AS `出租率`,
    ROUND(ci.cnt, 2) AS `本期收入`,
    ROUND(at.cnt, 2) AS `欠费总额`
FROM total_rooms tr
CROSS JOIN occupied_rooms oroom
CROSS JOIN tenant_total tt
CROSS JOIN current_income ci
CROSS JOIN arrears_total at;

  FROM qft_focus_tenants t
  JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info info ON info.company_id = 1001 AND info.tenant_id = t.id

  FROM qft_whole_tenants t

  JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.id = wr.housing_id AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE t.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0 AND t.tenants_name = '张三'

  WHERE t.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0 AND t.tenants_name = '张三'
) x
ORDER BY sort_order;

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE m AS (
  SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS month_start
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DATE_ADD(month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
  FROM m
  WHERE month_start < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
),
f AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS month_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS income_money,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS expend_money
  FROM qft_finance
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
    AND account_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
  GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m-01')
)
SELECT
  DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  IFNULL(f.income_money, 0) AS income_money,
  IFNULL(f.expend_money, 0) AS expend_money
FROM m
LEFT JOIN f ON f.month_start = m.month_start
ORDER BY m.month_start;

results.question: 三个门店哪个出租率最好？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT s.id AS store_id,
       s.name AS store_name,
       IFNULL(r.total_rooms, 0) AS total_rooms,
       IFNULL(r.leased_rooms, 0) AS leased_rooms,
       ROUND(
         CASE
           WHEN IFNULL(r.total_rooms, 0) = 0 THEN 0
           ELSE IFNULL(r.leased_rooms, 0) / r.total_rooms * 100
         END,
         2
       ) AS rental_rate
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           SUM(total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
           SUM(leased_rooms) AS leased_rooms
    FROM (
        SELECT wh.store_id AS store_id,
               COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
               SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
        FROM qft_whole_room wr
        JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
          ON wr.housing_id = wh.id
         AND wh.company_id = 1001
         AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
        WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY wh.store_id
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT fh.store_id AS store_id,
               COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
               SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
        FROM qft_focus_room fr
        JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
          ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
         AND fh.company_id = 1001
         AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
        WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY fh.store_id
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT jh.store_id AS store_id,
               COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
               SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
        FROM qft_joint_room jr
        JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
          ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
         AND jh.company_id = 1001
         AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
        WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY jh.store_id
    ) t
    GROUP BY store_id
) r ON s.id = r.store_id
WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
ORDER BY rental_rate DESC, total_rooms DESC, s.id ASC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: 每个门店的维修单情况怎么样？哪个最多？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  x.store_id,
  x.store_name,
  x.repair_order_total,
  x.unfinished_count,
  x.finished_count,
  x.no_progress_count,
  x.unreceived_count,
  x.received_count,
  x.max_repair_order_total,
  CASE WHEN x.repair_order_total = x.max_repair_order_total THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_max_store
FROM (
  SELECT
    t.*,
    MAX(t.repair_order_total) OVER () AS max_repair_order_total
  FROM (
    SELECT
      s.id AS store_id,
      s.name AS store_name,
      COUNT(r.id) AS repair_order_total,
      SUM(CASE WHEN r.repair_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unfinished_count,
      SUM(CASE WHEN r.repair_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finished_count,
      SUM(CASE WHEN r.repair_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_progress_count,
      SUM(CASE WHEN r.receive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreceived_count,
      SUM(CASE WHEN r.receive = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS received_count
    FROM qft_store s
    LEFT JOIN qft_room_repair r
      ON r.store_id = s.id
     AND r.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE s.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY s.id, s.name
  ) t
) x
ORDER BY x.repair_order_total DESC, x.store_id;

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,
    ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS income_money,
    ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS expend_money,
    ROUND(

results.question: 总收入和总支出是多少？我们赚钱了还是亏钱了？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expense,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money WHEN nature = 0 THEN -money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS net_profit,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0) > COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0) THEN '赚钱了'
    WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0) < COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0) THEN '亏钱了'
    ELSE '持平'
  END AS result
FROM qft_finance
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0;

results.question: 整租和合租对比一下，谁更赚钱？
results.generated_sql:
WITH biz_result AS (
    SELECT
        '整租' AS business_type,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(total_real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income_money,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(total_real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expend_money
    FROM qft_bill
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_invalid, 0) = 0
      AND sale_type = 2

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_type,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN COALESCE(total_real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income_money,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 2 THEN COALESCE(total_real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expend_money
    FROM qft_bill
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_invalid, 0) = 0
      AND sale_type = 3
)
SELECT
    business_type,
    income_money,
    expend_money,
    income_money - expend_money AS profit_money,
    ROUND((income_money - expend_money) / NULLIF(income_money, 0) * 100, 2) AS profit_rate,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (income_money - expend_money) DESC) AS profit_rank
FROM biz_result
ORDER BY profit_money DESC;

results.question: 有没有租客是逾期后才交的钱？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.business_type,
  t.tenant_id,
  t.tenant_name,
  COUNT(1) AS overdue_bill_count,
  ROUND(SUM(t.final_money), 2) AS overdue_bill_money,
  MAX(t.overdue_days) AS max_overdue_days,
  MIN(t.due_time) AS earliest_due_time,
  MAX(t.pay_time) AS latest_pay_time
FROM (
  SELECT
    '集中' AS business_type,
    fti.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
    fi.tenant_name AS tenant_name,
    fti.collection_date AS due_time,
    fti.repay_pay_date AS pay_time,
    fti.final_money AS final_money,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, fti.collection_date, fti.repay_pay_date) AS overdue_days
  FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fti
  LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info fi
    ON fi.id = fti.tenants_id
   AND fi.company_id = fti.company_id
  WHERE fti.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fti.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND fti.collection_date IS NOT NULL
    AND fti.repay_pay_date IS NOT NULL
    AND fti.repay_pay_date > fti.collection_date

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '整租/合租' AS business_type,
    jti.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
    jt.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
    jti.collection_date AS due_time,
    jti.real_pay_date AS pay_time,
    jti.final_money AS final_money,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, jti.collection_date, jti.real_pay_date) AS overdue_days
  FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
  LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
    ON jt.id = jti.tenants_id
   AND jt.company_id = jti.company_id
  WHERE jti.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jti.collection_date IS NOT NULL
    AND jti.real_pay_date IS NOT NULL
    AND jti.real_pay_date > jti.collection_date
) t
GROUP BY t.business_type, t.tenant_id, t.tenant_name
ORDER BY max_overdue_days DESC, overdue_bill_count DESC, overdue_bill_money DESC;

results.question: 城东门店合租的欠费租客有谁？欠的是哪间房？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT jt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
       jt.phone AS 联系电话,
       jh.door_number AS 门牌号,
       jr.room_number AS 房间号,
       SUM(ti.debt_money) AS 欠费金额
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income ti
JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
  ON jt.id = ti.tenants_id
 AND jt.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_joint_room jr
  ON jr.id = ti.room_id
 AND jr.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
  ON jh.id = ti.housing_id
 AND jh.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_store s
  ON s.id = ti.store_id
 AND s.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE ti.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ti.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(ti.is_history, 0) = 0
  AND ti.business_type = 3
  AND IFNULL(ti.debt_money, 0) > 0
  AND s.name = '城东门店'
GROUP BY jt.id, jt.tenants_name, jt.phone, jh.door_number, jr.room_number
ORDER BY 欠费金额 DESC, jt.tenants_name;

results.question: 帮我统计一下，整租房源的托管期限都是多久？快到期的有哪些？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.`类型`,
  t.`托管期限`,
  t.`房源数`,
  t.`最早到期时间`,
  t.`最晚到期时间`,
  t.`房源ID`,
  t.`房源编号`,
  t.`区域`,
  t.`物业地址`,
  t.`托管开始时间`,
  t.`托管到期时间`,
  t.`剩余天数`
FROM (
  SELECT
    1 AS sort_no,
    '托管期限统计' AS `类型`,
    CONCAT(IFNULL(wh.contract_year, 0), '年', IFNULL(wh.contract_month, 0), '月', IFNULL(wh.contract_day, 0), '天') AS `托管期限`,
    COUNT(*) AS `房源数`,
    MIN(wh.hosting_end_time) AS `最早到期时间`,
    MAX(wh.hosting_end_time) AS `最晚到期时间`,
    NULL AS `房源ID`,
    NULL AS `房源编号`,
    NULL AS `区域`,
    NULL AS `物业地址`,
    NULL AS `托管开始时间`,
    NULL AS `托管到期时间`,
    NULL AS `剩余天数`
  FROM qft_whole_housing wh
  WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  GROUP BY wh.contract_year, wh.contract_month, wh.contract_day

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    2 AS sort_no,
    '快到期房源' AS `类型`,
    CONCAT(IFNULL(wh.contract_year, 0), '年', IFNULL(wh.contract_month, 0), '月', IFNULL(wh.contract_day, 0), '天') AS `托管期限`,
    NULL AS `房源数`,
    NULL AS `最早到期时间`,
    NULL AS `最晚到期时间`,
    wh.id AS `房源ID`,
    wh.house_code AS `房源编号`,
    ar.area_name AS `区域`,
    CONCAT(
      IFNULL(ap.property_adrr, ''),
      IF(
        ap.detail_address IS NULL OR ap.detail_address = '',
        '',
        CONCAT('-', ap.detail_address)
      )
    ) AS `物业地址`,
    wh.hosting_create_time AS `托管开始时间`,
    wh.hosting_end_time AS `托管到期时间`,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, NOW(), wh.hosting_end_time) AS `剩余天数`
  FROM qft_whole_housing wh
  LEFT JOIN qft_area ar
    ON ar.id = wh.house_area
   AND ar.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ar.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON ap.id = wh.property_adrr
   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND wh.hosting_end_time >= NOW()
    AND wh.hosting_end_time < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
) t
ORDER BY t.sort_no, t.`托管到期时间` ASC, t.`房源ID` ASC;

JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND jh.is_delete = 0
JOIN qft_area_property ap ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id AND ap.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
  AND jr.is_delete = 0
  AND ap.property_adrr LIKE '%翡翠城%'
  AND jh.building = '2'
  AND jh.unit_name = '2-1'
  AND jh.door_number = '101';

results.question: 有多少房间还没做交割？

FROM (
    -- 集中式已租房间
    SELECT fr.id AS room_id, 1 AS sale_type
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fr.is_lease = 1
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- 整租已租房间
    SELECT wr.id AS room_id, 2 AS sale_type
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND wr.is_lease = 1

    -- 合租已租房间
    SELECT jr.id AS room_id, 3 AS sale_type

    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND jr.is_lease = 1
) rented

    FROM qft_focus_delivery_order fdo
    WHERE fdo.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fdo.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fdo.room_id = rented.room_id
      AND fdo.sale_type = rented.sale_type

results.question: 张三那小子交租了没？欠多少？

FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i

FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i

results.question: 哪个小区的房子好租？哪个不好租？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) AS 总房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已租房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 空置房间数,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) * 100, 2) AS 出租率,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 0 THEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), IFNULL(fr.last_time, fr.create_time)) END), 1) AS 空置房间平均空置天数
FROM qft_focus_room fr
INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fr.housing_id = fh.id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND fh.is_delete = 0 AND fh.is_check_out = 0
INNER JOIN qft_area_property ap ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id AND ap.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
  AND fr.is_delete = 0
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    COUNT(DISTINCT jr.id) AS 总房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已租房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 空置房间数,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT jr.id) * 100, 2) AS 出租率,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 0 THEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), IFNULL(jr.last_time, jr.create_time)) END), 1) AS 空置房间平均空置天数
FROM qft_joint_room jr
INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND jh.is_delete = 0 AND jh.is_check_out = 0
INNER JOIN qft_area_property ap ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id AND ap.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
  AND jr.is_delete = 0
  AND IFNULL(jr.transfer_status,0) != 1
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    COUNT(DISTINCT wr.id) AS 总房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已租房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 空置房间数,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT wr.id) * 100, 2) AS 出租率,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 0 THEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), IFNULL(wr.last_time, wr.create_time)) END), 1) AS 空置房间平均空置天数
FROM qft_whole_room wr
INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0
INNER JOIN qft_area_property ap ON wh.property_adrr = ap.id AND ap.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
  AND wr.is_delete = 0
  AND IFNULL(wr.transfer_status,0) != 1
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
ORDER BY 出租率 DESC, 空置房间平均空置天数 ASC;

results.question: 三个门店哪个出租率最好？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,
    COUNT(r.room_id) AS total_rooms,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(r.room_id) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT fr.id AS room_id, fr.store_id, fr.is_lease FROM qft_focus_room fr WHERE fr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete,0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT wr.id AS room_id, wh.store_id, wr.is_lease FROM qft_whole_room wr INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0 WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT jr.id AS room_id, jr.store_id, jr.is_lease FROM qft_joint_room jr WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0
) r ON s.id = r.store_id
WHERE s.company_id = 1001 
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete,0) = 0
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY occupancy_rate DESC
LIMIT 3;

    wh.housing_name,

results.question: 每个门店收了多少钱、付了多少钱？利润怎么样？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT

    s.name AS store_name,
    IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income,
    IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expend,
    IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) - IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS profit

    ON f.store_id = s.id

        WHEN 4 THEN '提前退房'

    END AS check_out_type_name,

results.question: 总收入和总支出是多少？我们赚钱了还是亏钱了？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS 总收入,
  SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS 总支出,
  SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS 盈亏金额,
  CASE 
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN '赚钱了'
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) < 0 THEN '亏钱了'
    ELSE '持平'
  END AS 盈亏状态
FROM qft_finance
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0;

results.question: 整租和合租对比一下，谁更赚钱？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  '整租' AS business_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT wh.id) AS housing_count,
  -- 整租应收（租客）
  IFNULL(SUM(ti_income.total_income), 0) AS total_income,
  -- 整租应支（房东）
  IFNULL(SUM(we_expend.total_expend), 0) AS total_expend,
  -- 差额（利润）
  IFNULL(SUM(ti_income.total_income), 0) - IFNULL(SUM(we_expend.total_expend), 0) AS profit
FROM qft_whole_housing wh
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT housing_id, SUM(final_money) AS total_income
  FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND business_type = 2
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND contract_type IN (1, 2, 3)
  GROUP BY housing_id
) ti_income ON ti_income.housing_id = wh.id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT housing_id, SUM(final_money) AS total_expend
  FROM qft_whole_bill_expend
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND is_history = 0
  GROUP BY housing_id
) we_expend ON we_expend.housing_id = wh.id
WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0

UNION ALL

SELECT
  '合租' AS business_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT jh.id) AS housing_count,
  IFNULL(SUM(ti_income.total_income), 0) AS total_income,
  IFNULL(SUM(je_expend.total_expend), 0) AS total_expend,
  IFNULL(SUM(ti_income.total_income), 0) - IFNULL(SUM(je_expend.total_expend), 0) AS profit
FROM qft_joint_housing jh
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT housing_id, SUM(final_money) AS total_income
  FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND business_type = 3
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND contract_type IN (1, 2, 3)
  GROUP BY housing_id
) ti_income ON ti_income.housing_id = jh.id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT housing_id, SUM(final_money) AS total_expend
  FROM qft_joint_bill_expend
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND is_history = 0
  GROUP BY housing_id
) je_expend ON je_expend.housing_id = jh.id
WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0;

results.question: 帮我看看哪个门店综合表现最差，我考虑关掉它。从出租率、收入、欠费几个角度分析一下。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,

    -- 房间总数（集中 + 整租 + 合租）
    IFNULL(fr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_total.cnt, 0) AS total_rooms,

    -- 已租房间数
    IFNULL(fr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_leased.cnt, 0) AS leased_rooms,

    -- 出租率
    ROUND(
        (IFNULL(fr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_leased.cnt, 0))
        / NULLIF(IFNULL(fr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_total.cnt, 0), 0) * 100
    , 2) AS occupancy_rate,

    -- 近12个月收入总额（财务已出纳）
    IFNULL(fin_income.total_income, 0) AS total_income_12m,

    -- 近12个月支出总额
    IFNULL(fin_expend.total_expend, 0) AS total_expend_12m,

    -- 收支差（利润）
    IFNULL(fin_income.total_income, 0) - IFNULL(fin_expend.total_expend, 0) AS net_profit_12m,

    -- 当前应收欠费（集中）
    IFNULL(focus_debt.debt, 0) AS focus_income_debt,

    -- 当前应收欠费（整租+合租）
    IFNULL(joint_debt.debt, 0) AS joint_whole_income_debt,

    -- 总欠费
    IFNULL(focus_debt.debt, 0) + IFNULL(joint_debt.debt, 0) AS total_income_debt,

    -- 综合评分（越低越差）：出租率权重40 + 月均利润权重30 + 欠费反向权重30
    ROUND(
        IFNULL(
            (IFNULL(fr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_leased.cnt, 0))
            / NULLIF(IFNULL(fr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_total.cnt, 0), 0) * 100
        , 0) * 0.4
        + (IFNULL(fin_income.total_income, 0) - IFNULL(fin_expend.total_expend, 0)) / 12 * 0.001 * 0.3
        - (IFNULL(focus_debt.debt, 0) + IFNULL(joint_debt.debt, 0)) * 0.001 * 0.3
    , 2) AS composite_score

FROM qft_store s

-- 集中房间总数
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_focus_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0
    GROUP BY store_id
) fr_total ON fr_total.store_id = s.id

-- 集中已租房间
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_focus_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_lease = 1
    GROUP BY store_id
) fr_leased ON fr_leased.store_id = s.id

-- 整租房间总数
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT wh.store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND wr.is_delete = 0
    GROUP BY wh.store_id
) wr_total ON wr_total.store_id = s.id

-- 整租已租房间
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT wh.store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND wr.is_delete = 0 AND wr.is_lease = 1
    GROUP BY wh.store_id
) wr_leased ON wr_leased.store_id = s.id

-- 合租房间总数
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_joint_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0
    GROUP BY store_id
) jr_total ON jr_total.store_id = s.id

-- 合租已租房间
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_joint_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_lease = 1
    GROUP BY store_id
) jr_leased ON jr_leased.store_id = s.id

-- 近12个月收入
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, SUM(money) AS total_income
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND nature = 1
      AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
    GROUP BY store_id
) fin_income ON fin_income.store_id = s.id

-- 近12个月支出
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, SUM(money) AS total_expend
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND nature = 0
      AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
    GROUP BY store_id
) fin_expend ON fin_expend.store_id = s.id

-- 集中应收欠费
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, SUM(debt_money) AS debt
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND pay_status IN (1, 2) AND contract_type = 1
    GROUP BY store_id
) focus_debt ON focus_debt.store_id = s.id

-- 整租+合租应收欠费
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, SUM(debt_money) AS debt
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND pay_status IN (1, 2) AND contract_type = 1
      AND transfer_status = 0
    GROUP BY store_id
) joint_debt ON joint_debt.store_id = s.id

WHERE s.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0

ORDER BY composite_score ASC
LIMIT 20;

results.question: 有没有租客是逾期后才交的钱？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT '集中' AS business, ti.id AS income_id, ft.name AS tenant_name, ft.phone,
       ti.collection_date, ti.repay_pay_date,
       DATEDIFF(ti.repay_pay_date, ti.collection_date) AS overdue_days
FROM qft_focus_tenants_income ti
JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft ON ft.id = ti.tenants_id AND ft.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE ti.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ti.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND ti.pay_status IN (2, 3)
  AND ti.repay_pay_date IS NOT NULL
  AND ti.repay_pay_date > ti.collection_date
  AND ti.is_deposit = 0

UNION ALL

SELECT CASE jti.business_type WHEN 2 THEN '整租' WHEN 3 THEN '合租' ELSE '其他' END AS business,
       jti.id AS income_id,
       CASE jti.business_type
           WHEN 2 THEN wt.tenants_name
           WHEN 3 THEN jt.tenants_name
       END AS tenant_name,
       CASE jti.business_type
           WHEN 2 THEN wt.phone
           WHEN 3 THEN jt.phone
       END AS phone,
       jti.collection_date, jti.real_pay_date,
       DATEDIFF(jti.real_pay_date, jti.collection_date) AS overdue_days
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt ON wt.id = jti.tenants_id AND jti.business_type = 2 AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt ON jt.id = jti.tenants_id AND jti.business_type = 3 AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE jti.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND jti.pay_status IN (2, 3)
  AND jti.real_pay_date IS NOT NULL
  AND jti.real_pay_date > jti.collection_date
  AND jti.is_deposit = 0

ORDER BY overdue_days DESC
LIMIT 200;

results.question: 帮三个门店做个健康度评分吧，出租率、收入、欠费率、维修响应都考虑进去。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,

    -- 1. 出租率 (已租房间数 / 总房间数)
    ROUND(IFNULL(rent.rented_rooms, 0) / NULLIF(rent.total_rooms, 0) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct,

    -- 2. 近90天收入总额
    IFNULL(income.total_income, 0) AS income_90d,

    -- 3. 欠费率 (欠费账单数 / 总账单数)
    ROUND(IFNULL(arrears.arrear_cnt, 0) / NULLIF(arrears.total_cnt, 0) * 100, 2) AS arrear_rate_pct,

    -- 4. 维修响应率 (已领取任务数 / 总维修工单数)
    ROUND(IFNULL(repair.received_cnt, 0) / NULLIF(repair.total_cnt, 0) * 100, 2) AS repair_response_rate_pct,

    -- 综合健康度评分 (满分100)
    ROUND(
        -- 出租率权重40分
        IFNULL(IFNULL(rent.rented_rooms, 0) / NULLIF(rent.total_rooms, 0), 0) * 40
        -- 欠费率权重30分 (欠费率越低越好，取反)
        + (1 - IFNULL(IFNULL(arrears.arrear_cnt, 0) / NULLIF(arrears.total_cnt, 0), 0)) * 30
        -- 维修响应率权重15分
        + IFNULL(IFNULL(repair.received_cnt, 0) / NULLIF(repair.total_cnt, 0), 0) * 15
        -- 收入排名权重15分 (按收入在本公司门店中的排名归一化)
        + IFNULL(income.total_income, 0) / NULLIF(income_max.max_income, 0) * 15
    , 2) AS health_score

FROM qft_store s

-- ========== 出租率：合并集中、整租、合租三种房间 ==========
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(total_r) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(rented_r) AS rented_rooms
    FROM (
        -- 集中房间
        SELECT store_id,
               COUNT(*) AS total_r,
               SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_r
        FROM qft_focus_room
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0
        GROUP BY store_id
        UNION ALL
        -- 整租房间
        SELECT wr.company_id AS store_id_placeholder,
               COUNT(*) AS total_r,
               SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_r
        FROM qft_whole_room wr
        INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0
        WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND wr.is_delete = 0
        GROUP BY wh.store_id
        UNION ALL
        -- 合租房间
        SELECT jr.store_id,
               COUNT(*) AS total_r,
               SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_r
        FROM qft_joint_room jr
        WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND jr.is_delete = 0
        GROUP BY jr.store_id
    ) room_union
    GROUP BY store_id
) rent ON rent.store_id = s.id

-- ========== 近90天收入 ==========
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           SUM(money) AS total_income
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND nature = 1
      AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
    GROUP BY store_id
) income ON income.store_id = s.id

-- ========== 欠费率：合并集中应收 + 整租合租应收 ==========
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(total_c) AS total_cnt,
        SUM(arrear_c) AS arrear_cnt
    FROM (
        -- 集中应收
        SELECT store_id,
               COUNT(*) AS total_c,
               SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status IN (1, 2) AND collection_date < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS arrear_c
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND contract_type = 1
        GROUP BY store_id
        UNION ALL
        -- 整租/合租应收
        SELECT store_id,
               COUNT(*) AS total_c,
               SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status IN (1, 2) AND collection_date < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS arrear_c
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND contract_type = 1
        GROUP BY store_id
    ) arrear_union
    GROUP BY store_id
) arrears ON arrears.store_id = s.id

-- ========== 维修响应率 ==========
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           COUNT(*) AS total_cnt,
           SUM(CASE WHEN receive = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS received_cnt
    FROM qft_room_repair
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
    GROUP BY store_id
) repair ON repair.store_id = s.id

-- ========== 收入最大值（用于归一化） ==========
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(t.total_income) AS max_income
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id, SUM(money) AS total_income
        FROM qft_finance
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND nature = 1
          AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
        GROUP BY store_id
    ) t
) income_max

WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0

ORDER BY health_score DESC
LIMIT 3;
